  • The authenticated layout’s Server Component reads tenant_members.onboarding_completed from Supabase and calls redirect('/welcome') if false AND user was created via invitation (not org owner).
  • If onboarding_completed = true → render the layout children (e.g., /dashboard) as normal.
  • The /welcome route’s Server Component checks onboarding_completed; if already true, redirects to /dashboard.
  • PPR sends the static shell (nav, sidebar skeleton) immediately while the onboarding check resolves behind a <Suspense> boundary.
Cross-References

Section 13c — Invitation acceptance flow that precedes this onboarding. Section 13h — Dashboard that the user lands on after onboarding. Section 5 — RBAC roles that determine tour content. Section 13e — Account settings where “Restart product tour” button lives.

13m. Help Bot (Global)

The Help Bot is a lightweight in-app assistant present on every authenticated page. It reuses the Support Agent RAG infrastructure (Section 7c) with a separate Kiptra-product-specific knowledge base and Haiku-only model routing.

Trigger & Panel

  • Floating button: Fixed position, bottom-right corner (bottom-20 right-6 mobile, bottom-6 right-6 desktop). 48×48 mobile / 56×56 desktop, z-50, MessageCircleQuestion icon, bg-primary. Present on ALL authenticated pages (rendered in root authenticated layout).
  • Panel: Slide-out from right, full-height, max-w-[400px], glass/frosted background (bg-black/30 backdrop-blur-[2px]). Semi-transparent backdrop overlay.
  • Close: Click backdrop, click X button, or press Escape.

Mode 1: Quick Help (Default)

  • Search bar: Full-text search across all contextual suggestions and KB articles.
  • Contextual suggestions: 2–3 route-aware questions based on current page. Uses longest-prefix matching against 16+ route contexts: dashboard, agents, billing, integrations, team, approvals, escalations, projects, customers, bos, reports, onboarding, notifications, design/kitchen-bath, profile, security.
  • Quick links: 6 items — Getting Started, Agent Config, Integrations, Team, Billing, Reports.
  • AI Assistant CTA: Gradient-bordered card leading to Chat mode.
  • Contact Support: Email link + “Schedule a call” (Owner/Admin only via RBAC).

Mode 2: AI Chat

  • Welcome state: Bot intro + 3 suggestion chips from current route context.
  • Streaming: AI SDK v6 streamText → SSE to chat panel (same pattern as agent execution streaming). 30ms-per-word text effect with animated cursor.
  • Typing indicator: 3 bouncing dots with staggered animation delays.
  • Deep links: Action buttons in responses (e.g., “Go to Billing →”) that navigate within the app.
  • Feedback: ThumbsUp/ThumbsDown after each response (“Was this helpful?”). Stored in support_messages with source: 'help_bot'.
  • Backend: POST /api/v1/help — takes { message, route, role }, returns streamed response with optional actionLinks. Uses support_conversations / support_messages tables with source: 'help_bot' discriminator (no new tables).

RBAC

  • All authenticated roles see the Help Bot button and can use both modes.
  • “Schedule a call” link visible to Owner/Admin only.

Accessibility

  • role="dialog", aria-modal="true", aria-label="Help panel".
  • Focus trapped inside panel when open. Auto-focus on search input.
  • Escape key closes the panel.
  • All interactive elements keyboard-accessible.

Cost Model

~$0.005/response (Haiku only, short answers). Estimated $10–20/mo across all tenants at scale (infrequent usage pattern — most users check Quick Help, few enter AI Chat).

Cross-References

Section 7c — Support Agent RAG infrastructure that powers the Help Bot backend. Section 14 — API contract for POST /api/v1/help.

Consolidated RBAC Permission Matrix

The following matrix provides a single reference for role-based access across all product features. This consolidates the per-section RBAC rules defined above into one authoritative table.

CapabilityOwnerAdminManagerDesignerBookkeeperViewer
View dashboardFullFullScopedScopedScopedRead-only
Manage agents (enable/disable, configure)✓✓✗✗✗✗
View agent output✓✓ScopedScopedScoped✓
Approve/reject escalations✓✓Scoped✗✗✗
Connect/disconnect integrations✓✓✗✗✗✗
View integration status✓✓✓✓✓✓
Team managementFullLimited*View✗✗✗
Billing managementFullView✗✗✗✗
Account settings (own profile)OwnOwnOwnOwnOwnOwn
Invited user onboarding & tourN/A*✓✓✓✓✓
Help Bot (Quick Help + AI Chat)✓✓✓✓✓✓
Help Bot “Schedule a call”✓✓✗✗✗✗
View/manage customersFullFullFullRead-onlyRead-only (financial view)Read-only
View/manage projectsFullFullFullRead + assigned tasksFinancial viewRead-only
Approve agent outputs✓✓Scoped✗✗✗
View reportsAllAllTeamPersonalFinancialPersonal
View notifications (full page)OwnOwnOwnOwnOwnOwn
Agent chat & workspace✓✓ScopedScopedScopedRead-only
Business OS hub✓✓✓✓✓✓

*Admin cannot remove the Owner or change their own role. Owner uses Section 13d onboarding (not invited user flow).

Cross-References

Section 5 — defines the six RBAC roles, their hierarchy, and enforcement via Hono middleware. Section 13f — team management RBAC details. Section 13g — billing RBAC details. Section 13l — invited user onboarding and product tour. Each subsection above (13h–13k) includes per-feature RBAC callouts that align with this matrix.

14. Developer Experience & Build Readiness

This section consolidates the monorepo structure, directory layout, and developer-facing conventions that complement the infrastructure defined in Section 12. These specifications ensure a new developer can clone the repository and be productive within a single session.

Monorepo Structure

Tooling: pnpm workspaces + Turborepo for task orchestration and build caching.

Package structure:

  • packages/frontend/ — Next.js 16 App Router (deployed to Vercel)
  • packages/backend/ — Hono API server + BullMQ workers + NATS subscribers (deployed to VPS via Docker)
  • packages/shared/ — Zod schemas, TypeScript types, domain model interfaces (consumed by both frontend and backend as a workspace dependency)
  • packages/config/ — Shared ESLint, TypeScript, and Prettier configurations
  • packages/editor/ — TipTap rich-text editor configuration, extensions, and wrapper components. Powers collaborative document editing (meeting recaps, SOPs, project notes) with real-time sync via Hocuspocus (consumed by frontend)

Build order: shared → editor + backend + frontend (parallel, editor and frontend co-build). TypeScript project references: each package has composite: true, root tsconfig.json has references array pointing to all packages. Turborepo pipeline: build depends on ^build (shared builds first). The shared package exports via direct file imports (e.g., @kiptra/shared/schemas/user), NOT barrel exports.

Repository Directory Tree

Directory
kiptra-ai/
├── packages/
│   ├── frontend/          — Next.js 16 App Router
│   │   ├── app/           — Route segments (dashboard/, customers/, projects/, approvals/, reports/, notifications/, bos/, settings/, onboard/, escalations/)
│   │   ├── components/    — UI components (providers/, forms/, realtime/, charts/)
│   │   └── lib/           — Frontend utilities, hooks, API client (hcWithType)
│   ├── backend/           — Hono API + Workers
│   │   ├── src/
│   │   │   ├── routes/    — Hono route handlers (v1/agents/, v1/tenants/, v1/customers/, v1/projects/, webhooks/)
│   │   │   ├── workers/   — BullMQ job processors (agent-executor, email-processor)
│   │   │   ├── agents/    — Agent implementations (discovery/, estimate/, navigator/)
│   │   │   ├── lib/
│   │   │   │   ├── ai/    — AI SDK adapter layer (gateway, tools, prompt-cache)
│   │   │   │   ├── integrations/ — IntegrationAdapter implementations (jobtread/, quickbooks/)
│   │   │   │   ├── auth/  — better-auth server configuration
│   │   │   │   └── encryption/ — AES-256-GCM envelope encryption service
│   │   │   ├── middleware/ — Hono middleware (tenant-context, rate-limit, logging, cors)
│   │   │   └── subscribers/ — NATS JetStream subscribers
│   │   ├── test/
│   │   │   └── integration/ — Integration tests (DB, NATS, BullMQ, external APIs)
│   │   └── Dockerfile     — Multi-stage, tini, USER node
│   ├── editor/            — TipTap rich-text editor package
│   │   ├── src/           — Editor config, extensions, toolbar components
│   │   └── package.json   — TipTap dependencies isolated from frontend
│   └── shared/            — Cross-package types and schemas
│       ├── schemas/       — Zod schemas (user.ts, tenant.ts, agent.ts, estimate.ts)
│       ├── domain/        — Domain model interfaces (Project, Estimate, Contact)
│       ├── types/         — Shared TypeScript types
│       └── package.json   — Must include "exports" field for subpath imports
├── supabase/              — Supabase migrations, seed data, RLS policies
├── docker-compose.yml     — Production Compose
├── docker-compose.local.yml — Local dev Compose
├── turbo.json             — Turborepo pipeline config
├── .env.example           — Environment variable manifest
├── .husky/                — Git hooks (pre-commit: lint-staged)
├── docs/
│   ├── adr/               — Architecture Decision Records (see ADR template below)
│   └── runbooks/          — Operational runbooks
└── .github/workflows/     — CI/CD pipeline definitions

Testing Conventions

  • Unit tests: Co-located with source files as *.test.ts (e.g., src/routes/agents.ts → src/routes/agents.test.ts). Run via vitest.
  • Integration tests: Located in packages/backend/test/integration/. These test real database connections, NATS pub/sub, BullMQ job processing, and external API contracts. Run via vitest --project integration with a test Docker Compose stack.
  • E2E tests: Located in packages/frontend/e2e/. Playwright tests against the running application. Run via pnpm --filter frontend test:e2e.
  • Coverage target: 80% line coverage minimum (enforced by CI). Coverage reports generated by Vitest and uploaded to Codecov.

Git Workflow & Commit Conventions

  • Branching strategy: Trunk-based development with short-lived feature branches. All branches merge to main via pull request. Branch naming: feat/, fix/, chore/, docs/ prefixes.
  • Commit convention: Conventional Commits enforced by commitlint. Format: type(scope): description. Types: feat, fix, chore, docs, test, refactor, perf, ci. Scopes: frontend, backend, shared, editor, infra. This enables future automated semantic versioning via release-please.
  • Pre-commit hooks: Husky + lint-staged. On every commit: ESLint (fix mode) + Prettier (write mode) + TypeScript type-check (tsc --noEmit) on staged files only. Hook runs in <10s for typical commits. Install: pnpm prepare (runs husky install).

Frontend Conventions

  • Form management: react-hook-form + @hookform/resolvers/zod for all client-component forms. Zod schemas imported from @kiptra/shared/schemas/ to ensure frontend and backend validate identically. No useState-based form state.
  • Data fetching (client-side): TanStack Query (@tanstack/react-query) for all client-side data fetching, caching, and revalidation. Query keys follow the pattern [entity, id?, filters?]. Mutations use useMutation with optimistic updates where appropriate. Server components use direct fetch with Next.js caching.
  • State management: Zustand for client-side state that requires cross-component sharing, specifically Socket.io real-time state (connection status, live agent updates, notification queue). One store per domain: useRealtimeStore, useNotificationStore. No global state for server-fetched data (that belongs in TanStack Query cache).
  • Error boundaries: See Section 13 UX Specifications for the full error boundary strategy, including placement, fallback UI, and Sentry integration.

TypeScript Configuration

  • Project references: Each package’s tsconfig.json includes "composite": true, "declaration": true, and "declarationMap": true. The root tsconfig.json contains a "references" array pointing to all packages. This enables incremental builds and proper cross-package type resolution.
  • Shared package exports: The packages/shared/package.json must include an "exports" field mapping subpath imports (e.g., "./schemas/*": "./src/schemas/*.ts"). This replaces barrel exports and enables tree-shaking. Consumers import via @kiptra/shared/schemas/user, not @kiptra/shared.

Code Review Guidelines

  • Required approvals: 1 approval required before merge (enforced by branch protection).
  • Review focus areas: RLS policy correctness on any DB migration, tenant isolation in new API routes, AI prompt changes reviewed for injection risks, dependency additions justified in PR description.
  • PR size target: Under 400 lines changed. PRs exceeding 400 lines should be split unless they are generated code (migrations, schemas).
  • Review SLA: Reviews completed within 24 hours of PR creation.

Developer Onboarding

A new developer should be productive within 1 hour following this sequence:

Shell
# 1. Clone and install
git clone git@github.com:kiptra-ai/kiptra-ai.git
cd kiptra-ai
pnpm install

# 2. Configure environment
cp .env.example .env.local
# Fill in required values (Supabase URL, anon key, etc.) — see .env.example comments

# 3. Start local services (Supabase local, NATS, Valkey)
docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml up -d

# 4. Run database migrations
pnpm --filter backend db:migrate

# 5. Start development servers
pnpm dev
# Turborepo starts frontend (localhost:3000) + backend (localhost:8787) in parallel

# 6. Verify setup
pnpm test
# All unit tests should pass. If not, check .env.local values.

Target: Clone → pnpm install → cp .env.example .env.local → pnpm dev → productive in under 1 hour.

ADR (Architecture Decision Record) Template

All significant architectural decisions are recorded in docs/adr/ using the following format:

Markdown
# ADR-NNN: [Title]

## Status
[Proposed | Accepted | Deprecated | Superseded by ADR-NNN]

## Context
What is the issue that we are seeing that motivates this decision?

## Decision
What is the change that we are proposing and/or doing?

## Consequences
What becomes easier or more difficult because of this change?

## Alternatives Considered
What other options were evaluated and why were they rejected?

File naming: docs/adr/ADR-001-use-hono-over-express.md. ADRs are never deleted — deprecated decisions are marked as such with a pointer to the superseding ADR.

Cross-References to Section 12

The following infrastructure concerns are defined in Section 12 (Infrastructure, Security & DevOps) and should not be duplicated here:

  • CI/CD pipeline: See Section 12 “CI/CD Pipeline (Wave 1, Day 1)” for the full lint → type-check → test → build → deploy pipeline.
  • CI quality gates: See Section 12 “CI Quality Gates” for ESLint rules, TypeScript strictness, coverage thresholds, and CI time targets.
  • Staging environment: See Section 12 for staging deployment strategy (secondary VPS as staging before production promotion).
  • Environment variable manifest: See .env.example in the repository root. Section 12 defines which variables are required per environment (local, staging, production).

API Contracts & Domain Model (Complete Reference)

Single source of truth for all TypeScript types, Zod schemas, API route contracts, WebSocket events, and NATS subject catalog. This file lives at packages/shared/src/contracts/api-contracts.ts and is consumed by both frontend (TanStack Query hooks) and backend (Hono route handlers).

Four parts: (1) Canonical domain model — Zod schemas for Tenant, User, Agent, Execution, Escalation, Draft, Integration, Support, Notification, and Billing entities. (2) API route definitions — request/response schemas for all Hono endpoints. (3) WebSocket event catalog — Socket.io event types for real-time dashboard updates. (4) NATS subject catalog — JetStream subjects with publisher/consumer documentation.

PartContentKey Types
Part 1Canonical Domain ModelTenantSchema, UserSchema, AgentSchema, AgentExecutionSchema, EscalationSchema, DraftSchema, IntegrationSchema, SupportConversationSchema, NotificationSchema
Part 2API Route Definitions (Hono + Zod)Tenants CRUD, Agents CRUD, Executions, Escalations, Drafts, Integrations, Support, Billing, Admin, Webhooks, Onboarding
Part 3WebSocket Event Catalog (Socket.io)ServerToClientEvents, ClientToServerEvents — agent status, notifications, support chat, connection lifecycle
Part 4NATS Subject Catalog (JetStream)27 subjects across Agent, Escalation, Draft, Billing, Integration, Notification, and System domains
 
TypeScript
/**
 * ============================================================================
 * KIPTRA AI — API CONTRACTS & DOMAIN MODEL
 * ============================================================================
 *
 * Single source of truth for:
 *   Part 1: Canonical Domain Model (src/domain/)
 *   Part 2: API Route Definitions (Hono + Zod)
 *   Part 3: WebSocket Event Catalog (Socket.io)
 *   Part 4: NATS Subject Catalog (JetStream)
 *
 * All types use Zod for runtime validation and TypeScript inference.
 * Follows plan_v3 specifications exactly.
 *
 * @module kiptra-api-contracts
 * @version 0.1.0
 * @date 2026-03-21
 */

import { z } from 'zod';

// ============================================================================
// PART 1: CANONICAL DOMAIN MODEL
// ============================================================================
// These are the shared types used across agents, integrations, and the API layer.
// Each entity maps to a file in src/domain/.

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// src/domain/tenant.ts
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

/** Pricing plan tiers — as const object, never enum (TS-03) */
export const PlanTier = {
  Starter: 'starter',
  Professional: 'professional',
  Enterprise: 'enterprise',
} as const;
export type PlanTier = (typeof PlanTier)[keyof typeof PlanTier];

/** Billing lifecycle states with explicit state machine transitions */
export const BillingStatus = {
  Active: 'active',
  PastDue: 'past_due',
  Canceling: 'canceling',
  Canceled: 'canceled',
} as const;
export type BillingStatus = (typeof BillingStatus)[keyof typeof BillingStatus];

/** Valid billing state transitions (Section 7 webhook event ordering) */
export const VALID_BILLING_TRANSITIONS: Record<BillingStatus, BillingStatus[]> = {
  active: ['past_due', 'canceling'],
  past_due: ['active', 'canceled'],
  canceling: ['canceled'],
  canceled: [],
};

/** Onboarding step progression */
export const OnboardingStep = {
  Company: 'company',
  Profile: 'profile',
  Plan: 'plan',
  Payment: 'payment',
  Team: 'team',
  Complete: 'complete',
} as const;
export type OnboardingStep = (typeof OnboardingStep)[keyof typeof OnboardingStep];

/** Feature flags stored as JSONB on tenants table (Phase 1 implementation) */
export const FeatureFlagSchema = z.record(z.string(), z.boolean()).default({});
export type FeatureFlags = z.infer<typeof FeatureFlagSchema>;

export const TenantSchema = z.object({
  /** UUID primary key */
  id: z.string().uuid(),
  /** Company/organization name */
  name: z.string().min(1).max(255),
  /** URL-safe tenant slug */
  slug: z.string().min(1).max(63),
  /** Industry vertical for template selection */
  industry_vertical: z.string().default('construction_remodeling'),
  /** Company size category */
  company_size: z.enum(['solo', 'small', 'medium', 'large']).default('small'),
  /** Current pricing plan */
  plan: z.nativeEnum(PlanTier),
  /** Billing lifecycle state */
  billing_status: z.nativeEnum(BillingStatus).default('active' as BillingStatus),
  /** Stripe customer ID */
  stripe_customer_id: z.string().nullable(),
  /** Stripe subscription ID */
  stripe_subscription_id: z.string().nullable(),
  /** Current onboarding step */
  onboarding_step: z.nativeEnum(OnboardingStep).default('company' as OnboardingStep),
  /** Whether onboarding is complete */
  onboarding_completed: z.boolean().default(false),
  /** Per-tenant feature flags (Phase 1: JSONB column) */
  feature_flags: FeatureFlagSchema,
  /** IANA timezone identifier (e.g., 'America/New_York') — required, no default */
  timezone: z.string().min(1),
  created_at: z.string().datetime(),
  updated_at: z.string().datetime(),
});
export type Tenant = z.infer<typeof TenantSchema>;

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// src/domain/user.ts
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

/** RBAC roles from Section 5 — 6-role hierarchy */
export const TenantRole = {
  Owner: 'owner',
  Admin: 'admin',
  Manager: 'manager',
  Designer: 'designer',
  Bookkeeper: 'bookkeeper',
  Viewer: 'viewer',
} as const;
export type TenantRole = (typeof TenantRole)[keyof typeof TenantRole];

/** Role-based access scopes for agent visibility */
export const ROLE_AGENT_ACCESS: Record<TenantRole, string[]> = {
  owner: ['*'], // All agents + CEO Agent
  admin: ['*'], // All agents except CEO Agent outputs
  manager: ['project_orchestrator', 'estimate_engine', 'discovery_concierge'],
  designer: ['design_spec_assistant'],
  bookkeeper: ['operations_controller'],
  viewer: [], // Read-only dashboards, no agent interaction
};

export const UserSchema = z.object({
  /** UUID primary key (managed by better-auth) */
  id: z.string().uuid(),
  /** User's email address */
  email: z.string().email(),
  /** Display name */
  name: z.string().min(1).max(255),
  /** URL to avatar image */
  avatar_url: z.string().url().nullable(),
  /** Whether MFA is enabled */
  mfa_enabled: z.boolean().default(false),
  /** Email verified status */
  email_verified: z.boolean().default(false),
  created_at: z.string().datetime(),
  updated_at: z.string().datetime(),
});
export type User = z.infer<typeof UserSchema>;

export const TenantMemberSchema = z.object({
  /** UUID primary key */
  id: z.string().uuid(),
  /** Foreign key to tenants.id */
  tenant_id: z.string().uuid(),
  /** Foreign key to users.id */
  user_id: z.string().uuid(),
  /** RBAC role within the tenant */
  role: z.nativeEnum(TenantRole),
  /** Whether the member is active */
  is_active: z.boolean().default(true),
  /** Whether member has completed their onboarding */
  onboarding_completed: z.boolean().default(false),
  created_at: z.string().datetime(),
  updated_at: z.string().datetime(),
});
export type TenantMember = z.infer<typeof TenantMemberSchema>;

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// src/domain/agent.ts
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

/** Agent type identifiers — 7-9 agents per persona (28 total types across 4 personas) */
export const AgentType = {
  DiscoveryConcierge: 'discovery_concierge',
  DesignSpecAssistant: 'design_spec_assistant',
  ProjectOrchestrator: 'project_orchestrator',
  EstimateEngine: 'estimate_engine',
  OperationsController: 'operations_controller',
  ExecutiveNavigator: 'executive_navigator',
  SupportAgent: 'support_agent',
} as const;
export type AgentType = (typeof AgentType)[keyof typeof AgentType];

/** Per-agent step limits (AI SDK v6 stopWhen values, +2 for structured output) */
export const AGENT_STEP_LIMITS: Record<AgentType, number> = {
  discovery_concierge: 7,
  design_spec_assistant: 10,
  project_orchestrator: 12,
  estimate_engine: 17,
  operations_controller: 10,
  executive_navigator: 12,
  support_agent: 7,
};

/** Per-agent max_tokens output limits (AI-07) */
export const AGENT_MAX_TOKENS: Record<AgentType, number> = {
  discovery_concierge: 2048,
  design_spec_assistant: 4096,
  project_orchestrator: 4096,
  estimate_engine: 8192,
  operations_controller: 4096,
  executive_navigator: 4096,
  support_agent: 512,
};

/** Trigger configuration for agent activation */
export const TriggerTypeSchema = z.enum([
  'manual',       // User-initiated via dashboard
  'scheduled',    // BullMQ cron (e.g., daily briefings)
  'webhook',      // External integration webhook
  'event',        // NATS inter-agent event
  'email',        // Inbound email via SendGrid
]);
export type TriggerType = z.infer<typeof TriggerTypeSchema>;

export const TriggerConfigSchema = z.object({
  type: TriggerTypeSchema,
  /** Cron expression for scheduled triggers */
  cron: z.string().optional(),
  /** NATS subject pattern for event triggers */
  subject: z.string().optional(),
  /** Webhook service name */
  webhook_service: z.string().optional(),
});
export type TriggerConfig = z.infer<typeof TriggerConfigSchema>;

export const AgentSchema = z.object({
  /** UUID primary key */
  id: z.string().uuid(),
  /** Foreign key to tenants.id */
  tenant_id: z.string().uuid(),
  /** Agent type identifier */
  agent_type: z.nativeEnum(AgentType),
  /** Display name (customizable per tenant) */
  name: z.string().min(1).max(255),
  /** Agent lifecycle status (matches DDL 3-state CHECK constraint) */
  status: z.enum(['active', 'paused', 'disabled']).default('active'),
  /** Agent configuration (JSONB — prompt, tools, model routing, etc.) */
  agent_config: z.record(z.unknown()).default({}),
  /** Prompt version identifier */
  prompt_version: z.string().optional(),
  /** SHA-256 hash of current prompt */
  prompt_hash: z.string().optional(),
  /** Trigger configurations for this agent instance */
  triggers: z.array(TriggerConfigSchema).default([]),
  /** Tool permission set — tools this agent can invoke */
  permissions: z.array(z.string()).default([]),
  created_at: z.string().datetime(),
  updated_at: z.string().datetime(),
});
export type Agent = z.infer<typeof AgentSchema>;

/** Platform-scoped agent template (shared across tenants) */
export const AgentTemplateSchema = z.object({
  id: z.string().uuid(),
  /** Template name (e.g., 'Construction Remodeling') */
  name: z.string(),
  /** Industry vertical */
  vertical: z.string(),
  /** Semantic version */
  version: z.string(),
  /** Agent configurations included in this template */
  agents: z.array(z.object({
    agent_type: z.nativeEnum(AgentType),
    default_config: z.record(z.unknown()),
    default_triggers: z.array(TriggerConfigSchema),
    default_permissions: z.array(z.string()),
  })),
  /** Whether this is the active version */
  is_active: z.boolean().default(true),
  created_at: z.string().datetime(),
});
export type AgentTemplate = z.infer<typeof AgentTemplateSchema>;

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// src/domain/execution.ts
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

/** Agent execution state machine (AI-19) — 9 explicit states */
export const ExecutionStatus = {
  Queued: 'QUEUED',
  Running: 'RUNNING',
  Completed: 'COMPLETED',
  Failed: 'FAILED',
  TimedOut: 'TIMED_OUT',
  AwaitingApproval: 'AWAITING_APPROVAL',
  Rejected: 'REJECTED',
  Cancelled: 'CANCELLED',
  DeadLetter: 'DEAD_LETTER',
  BillingPaused: 'BILLING_PAUSED',
} as const;
export type ExecutionStatus = (typeof ExecutionStatus)[keyof typeof ExecutionStatus];

/** Valid execution state transitions */
export const VALID_EXECUTION_TRANSITIONS: Record<ExecutionStatus, ExecutionStatus[]> = {
  QUEUED: ['RUNNING', 'CANCELLED', 'BILLING_PAUSED', 'DEAD_LETTER'],
  RUNNING: ['COMPLETED', 'FAILED', 'TIMED_OUT', 'AWAITING_APPROVAL', 'DEAD_LETTER'],
  COMPLETED: [],
  FAILED: ['DEAD_LETTER'],
  TIMED_OUT: ['DEAD_LETTER'],
  AWAITING_APPROVAL: ['COMPLETED', 'REJECTED'],
  REJECTED: [],
  CANCELLED: [],
  DEAD_LETTER: [],
  BILLING_PAUSED: [],
};

/** Model usage tracking per execution step */
export const ModelUsageSchema = z.object({
  /** Step number in the execution */
  step: z.number().int().nonneg(),
  /** Model used (e.g., 'claude-sonnet-4-6') */
  model: z.string(),
  /** Input tokens consumed */
  input_tokens: z.number().int().nonneg(),
  /** Output tokens generated */
  output_tokens: z.number().int().nonneg(),
  /** Cache read tokens (Anthropic) */
  cache_read_tokens: z.number().int().nonneg().default(0),
  /** Cache write tokens (Anthropic) */
  cache_write_tokens: z.number().int().nonneg().default(0),
  /** Cost in USD for this step */
  cost_usd: z.number().nonneg(),
});
export type ModelUsage = z.infer<typeof ModelUsageSchema>;

/** Tool call record for audit trail */
export const ToolCallRecordSchema = z.object({
  /** Tool name */
  tool_name: z.string(),
  /** Step number */
  step: z.number().int().nonneg(),
  /** Input parameters */
  input: z.record(z.unknown()),
  /** Output result */
  output: z.unknown(),
  /** Duration in ms */
  duration_ms: z.number().int().nonneg(),
  /** Whether the tool call succeeded */
  success: z.boolean(),
});
export type ToolCallRecord = z.infer<typeof ToolCallRecordSchema>;

export const AgentExecutionSchema = z.object({
  /** UUID primary key */
  id: z.string().uuid(),
  /** Foreign key to tenants.id */
  tenant_id: z.string().uuid(),
  /** Foreign key to agents.id */
  agent_id: z.string().uuid(),
  /** Agent type for quick filtering */
  agent_type: z.nativeEnum(AgentType),
  /** Current execution state */
  status: z.nativeEnum(ExecutionStatus),
  /** What triggered this execution */
  trigger_type: TriggerTypeSchema,
  /** Source identifier for the trigger (e.g., user_id, cron name, webhook service) */
  trigger_source: z.string(),
  /** Input data for the execution (JSONB) */
  input: z.record(z.unknown()).default({}),
  /** Final output of the execution (JSONB) */
  output: z.record(z.unknown()).nullable().default(null),
  /** Tool call history for audit trail */
  tool_call_history: z.array(ToolCallRecordSchema).default([]),
  /** Model usage per step */
  model_usage: z.array(ModelUsageSchema).default([]),
  /** Total cost in USD */
  total_cost_usd: z.number().nonneg().default(0),
  /** Total input tokens across all steps */
  total_input_tokens: z.number().int().nonneg().default(0),
  /** Total output tokens across all steps */
  total_output_tokens: z.number().int().nonneg().default(0),
  /** Number of steps executed */
  step_count: z.number().int().nonneg().default(0),
  /** Error message if failed */
  error_message: z.string().nullable().default(null),
  /** Error code for categorization */
  error_code: z.string().nullable().default(null),
  /** BullMQ job ID for cross-system correlation */
  bullmq_job_id: z.string().nullable().default(null),
  /** NATS message ID for cross-system correlation */
  nats_message_id: z.string().nullable().default(null),
  /** Reference to parent execution (for inter-agent chains) */
  parent_execution_id: z.string().uuid().nullable().default(null),
  /** Execution start time */
  started_at: z.string().datetime().nullable().default(null),
  /** Execution completion time */
  completed_at: z.string().datetime().nullable().default(null),
  created_at: z.string().datetime(),
  updated_at: z.string().datetime(),
});
export type AgentExecution = z.infer<typeof AgentExecutionSchema>;

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// src/domain/escalation.ts
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

/** Escalation severity levels */
export const EscalationSeverity = {
  P1: 'P1',
  P2: 'P2',
  P3: 'P3',
  P4: 'P4',
} as const;
export type EscalationSeverity = (typeof EscalationSeverity)[keyof typeof EscalationSeverity];

/** Escalation status */
export const EscalationStatus = {
  Pending: 'pending',
  Approved: 'approved',
  Rejected: 'rejected',
  Modified: 'modified',
  Expired: 'expired',
} as const;
export type EscalationStatus = (typeof EscalationStatus)[keyof typeof EscalationStatus];

/** What type of action the escalation gates */
export const EscalationActionType = {
  SendEmail: 'send_email',
  CreateEstimate: 'create_estimate',
  CreateRecord: 'create_record',
  ModifySchedule: 'modify_schedule',
  FinancialAction: 'financial_action',
  SystemAction: 'system_action',
} as const;
export type EscalationActionType = (typeof EscalationActionType)[keyof typeof EscalationActionType];

export const EscalationSchema = z.object({
  /** UUID primary key */
  id: z.string().uuid(),
  /** Foreign key to tenants.id */
  tenant_id: z.string().uuid(),
  /** Foreign key to agent_executions.id */
  execution_id: z.string().uuid(),
  /** Which agent generated this escalation */
  agent_type: z.nativeEnum(AgentType),
  /** What type of action is being escalated */
  action_type: z.nativeEnum(EscalationActionType),
  /** Severity level */
  severity: z.nativeEnum(EscalationSeverity),
  /** Current status */
  status: z.nativeEnum(EscalationStatus),
  /** Human-readable title */
  title: z.string().min(1).max(500),
  /** Detailed description of what the agent wants to do */
  description: z.string(),
  /** The proposed action payload (JSONB — e.g., email content, estimate data) */
  proposed_action: z.record(z.unknown()),
  /** Modified action payload if user edited before approving */
  modified_action: z.record(z.unknown()).nullable().default(null),
  /** Why the agent triggered escalation */
  escalation_reason: z.string(),
  /** Diagnostic context from the agent */
  diagnostic_context: z.record(z.unknown()).default({}),
  /** Who resolved this escalation */
  resolved_by: z.string().uuid().nullable().default(null),
  /** Resolution notes */
  resolution_notes: z.string().nullable().default(null),
  /** When the escalation was resolved */
  resolved_at: z.string().datetime().nullable().default(null),
  /** Expiration time for auto-expire */
  expires_at: z.string().datetime().nullable().default(null),
  created_at: z.string().datetime(),
  updated_at: z.string().datetime(),
});
export type Escalation = z.infer<typeof EscalationSchema>;

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// src/domain/draft.ts
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

/** Draft status — human-in-the-loop approval */
export const DraftStatus = {
  Pending: 'pending',
  Approved: 'approved',
  Rejected: 'rejected',
  Modified: 'modified',
  SendFailed: 'send_failed',
} as const;
export type DraftStatus = (typeof DraftStatus)[keyof typeof DraftStatus];

/** Draft content types */
export const DraftContentType = {
  Email: 'email',
  Estimate: 'estimate',
  Report: 'report',
  PurchaseOrder: 'purchase_order',
  LienWaiver: 'lien_waiver',
  MorningBriefing: 'morning_briefing',
  ChangeOrder: 'change_order',
} as const;
export type DraftContentType = (typeof DraftContentType)[keyof typeof DraftContentType];

export const DraftSchema = z.object({
  /** UUID primary key */
  id: z.string().uuid(),
  /** Foreign key to tenants.id */
  tenant_id: z.string().uuid(),
  /** Foreign key to agent_executions.id */
  execution_id: z.string().uuid(),
  /** Which agent generated this draft */
  agent_type: z.nativeEnum(AgentType),
  /** Content type */
  content_type: z.nativeEnum(DraftContentType),
  /** Current status */
  status: z.nativeEnum(DraftStatus),
  /** Human-readable title */
  title: z.string().min(1).max(500),
  /** The draft content (JSONB — structure depends on content_type) */
  content: z.record(z.unknown()),
  /** Modified content if user edited before approving */
  modified_content: z.record(z.unknown()).nullable().default(null),
  /** Diff between original and modified content (for agent quality tracking) */
  modification_diff: z.record(z.unknown()).nullable().default(null),
  /** Who reviewed this draft */
  reviewed_by: z.string().uuid().nullable().default(null),
  /** Review notes */
  review_notes: z.string().nullable().default(null),
  /** When the draft was reviewed */
  reviewed_at: z.string().datetime().nullable().default(null),
  created_at: z.string().datetime(),
  updated_at: z.string().datetime(),
});
export type Draft = z.infer<typeof DraftSchema>;

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// src/domain/integration.ts
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

/** Supported integration services */
export const IntegrationService = {
  JobTread: 'jobtread',
  QuickBooks: 'quickbooks',
  GoogleCalendar: 'google_calendar',
  GoogleDrive: 'google_drive',
  Gmail: 'gmail',
  OutlookEmail: 'outlook_email',
  OutlookCalendar: 'outlook_calendar',
  SendGrid: 'sendgrid',
  Stripe: 'stripe',
  HubSpot: 'hubspot',
  OpenWeatherMap: 'openweathermap',
} as const;
export type IntegrationService = (typeof IntegrationService)[keyof typeof IntegrationService];

/** OAuth/API key auth methods */
export const AuthMethod = {
  OAuth2: 'oauth2',
  ApiKey: 'api_key',
} as const;
export type AuthMethod = (typeof AuthMethod)[keyof typeof AuthMethod];

/** Integration connection status */
export const IntegrationStatus = {
  Connected: 'connected',
  Disconnected: 'disconnected',
  Error: 'error',
  Expired: 'expired',
  Refreshing: 'refreshing',
} as const;
export type IntegrationStatus = (typeof IntegrationStatus)[keyof typeof IntegrationStatus];

export const IntegrationSchema = z.object({
  /** UUID primary key */
  id: z.string().uuid(),
  /** Foreign key to tenants.id */
  tenant_id: z.string().uuid(),
  /** Integration service identifier */
  service: z.nativeEnum(IntegrationService),
  /** Authentication method */
  auth_method: z.nativeEnum(AuthMethod),
  /** Connection status */
  status: z.nativeEnum(IntegrationStatus),
  /**
   * Encrypted OAuth/API credentials (AES-256-GCM envelope encryption).
   * Format: key_version (2B) || iv (12B) || ciphertext || auth_tag (16B), base64-encoded.
   * NEVER exposed via API responses.
   */
  encrypted_credentials: z.string(),
  /** Encryption key version for KEK rotation */
  key_version: z.number().int(),
  /** When the access token expires */
  access_token_expires_at: z.string().datetime().nullable(),
  /** When the refresh token was obtained (QB rotation tracking — INT-02) */
  refresh_token_obtained_at: z.string().datetime().nullable(),
  /** Last successful data sync timestamp */
  last_sync_at: z.string().datetime().nullable(),
  /** Last sync error message */
  last_sync_error: z.string().nullable().default(null),
  /** Webhook token for inbound webhooks (cryptographic random hex) */
  webhook_token: z.string().nullable().default(null),
  /** Integration-specific configuration (JSONB) */
  config: z.record(z.unknown()).default({}),
  /** Service-specific scopes granted */
  scopes: z.array(z.string()).default([]),
  created_at: z.string().datetime(),
  updated_at: z.string().datetime(),
});
export type Integration = z.infer<typeof IntegrationSchema>;

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// src/domain/project.ts — Canonical domain model (from JobTread ACL)
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

/** Project status in the canonical model */
export const ProjectStatus = {
  Lead: 'lead',
  Proposed: 'proposed',
  Active: 'active',
  OnHold: 'on_hold',
  Completed: 'completed',
  Cancelled: 'cancelled',
} as const;
export type ProjectStatus = (typeof ProjectStatus)[keyof typeof ProjectStatus];

export const ProjectSchema = z.object({
  /** UUID primary key (internal, not JobTread ID) */
  id: z.string().uuid(),
  /** Foreign key to tenants.id */
  tenant_id: z.string().uuid(),
  /** External system ID (e.g., JobTread project ID) for sync */
  external_id: z.string().nullable().default(null),
  /** Source integration */
  source: z.nativeEnum(IntegrationService).nullable().default(null),
  /** Project name */
  name: z.string().min(1).max(500),
  /** Project status */
  status: z.nativeEnum(ProjectStatus),
  /** Project description */
  description: z.string().default(''),
  /** Foreign key to contacts.id (primary client) */
  client_id: z.string().uuid().nullable(),
  /** Project address */
  address: z.object({
    street: z.string().default(''),
    city: z.string().default(''),
    state: z.string().default(''),
    zip: z.string().default(''),
  }).default({}),
  /** Estimated start date */
  start_date: z.string().datetime().nullable().default(null),
  /** Estimated end date */
  end_date: z.string().datetime().nullable().default(null),
  /** Actual start date */
  actual_start_date: z.string().datetime().nullable().default(null),
  /** Actual end date */
  actual_end_date: z.string().datetime().nullable().default(null),
  /** Contract value in cents */
  contract_value_cents: z.number().int().nonneg().default(0),
  /** Total billed in cents */
  total_billed_cents: z.number().int().nonneg().default(0),
  /** Project-specific metadata (JSONB) */
  metadata: z.record(z.unknown()).default({}),
  /** Last synced from external source */
  last_synced_at: z.string().datetime().nullable().default(null),
  created_at: z.string().datetime(),
  updated_at: z.string().datetime(),
});
export type Project = z.infer<typeof ProjectSchema>;

/** Task within a project (schedule items) */
export const TaskSchema = z.object({
  id: z.string().uuid(),
  tenant_id: z.string().uuid(),
  project_id: z.string().uuid(),
  external_id: z.string().nullable().default(null),
  name: z.string().min(1).max(500),
  description: z.string().default(''),
  status: z.enum(['pending', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'cancelled']),
  assigned_to: z.string().uuid().nullable().default(null),
  start_date: z.string().datetime().nullable().default(null),
  due_date: z.string().datetime().nullable().default(null),
  completed_at: z.string().datetime().nullable().default(null),
  sort_order: z.number().int().default(0),
  /** Parent task for subtask hierarchies */
  parent_task_id: z.string().uuid().nullable().default(null),
  metadata: z.record(z.unknown()).default({}),
  last_synced_at: z.string().datetime().nullable().default(null),
  created_at: z.string().datetime(),
  updated_at: z.string().datetime(),
});
export type Task = z.infer<typeof TaskSchema>;

/** Document reference (Google Drive, attachments) */
export const DocumentSchema = z.object({
  id: z.string().uuid(),
  tenant_id: z.string().uuid(),
  project_id: z.string().uuid().nullable(),
  /** Document type classification */
  doc_type: z.enum(['submittal', 'cut_sheet', 'warranty', 'photo', 'contract', 'permit', 'other']),
  name: z.string().min(1).max(500),
  /** MIME type */
  mime_type: z.string(),
  /** File size in bytes */
  size_bytes: z.number().int().nonneg(),
  /** Storage URL (Google Drive link or DO Spaces URL) */
  storage_url: z.string().url(),
  /** External system document ID */
  external_id: z.string().nullable().default(null),
  metadata: z.record(z.unknown()).default({}),
  created_at: z.string().datetime(),
  updated_at: z.string().datetime(),
});
export type Document = z.infer<typeof DocumentSchema>;

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// src/domain/estimate.ts
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export const EstimateLineSchema = z.object({
  /** UUID primary key */
  id: z.string().uuid(),
  /** Category (e.g., 'Cabinets', 'Labor', 'Electrical') */
  category: z.string(),
  /** Line item description */
  description: z.string(),
  /** Quantity */
  quantity: z.number().nonneg(),
  /** Unit of measure */
  unit: z.string().default('each'),
  /** Unit price in cents */
  unit_price_cents: z.number().int(),
  /** Line total in cents (quantity * unit_price_cents) */
  total_cents: z.number().int(),
  /** Material SKU if applicable */
  sku: z.string().nullable().default(null),
  /** Supplier/vendor name */
  supplier: z.string().nullable().default(null),
  /** Notes for this line item */
  notes: z.string().default(''),
  /** Sort order within the estimate */
  sort_order: z.number().int().default(0),
});
export type EstimateLine = z.infer<typeof EstimateLineSchema>;

export const EstimateSchema = z.object({
  id: z.string().uuid(),
  tenant_id: z.string().uuid(),
  project_id: z.string().uuid(),
  external_id: z.string().nullable().default(null),
  /** Estimate name/title */
  name: z.string().min(1).max(500),
  /** Status of this estimate */
  status: z.enum(['draft', 'sent', 'approved', 'rejected', 'revised']),
  /** Version number for revisions */
  version: z.number().int().default(1),
  /** Line items */
  line_items: z.array(EstimateLineSchema).default([]),
  /** Subtotal in cents (sum of line totals) */
  subtotal_cents: z.number().int(),
  /** Tax amount in cents */
  tax_cents: z.number().int().default(0),
  /** Discount in cents */
  discount_cents: z.number().int().default(0),
  /** Grand total in cents */
  total_cents: z.number().int(),
  /** Markup percentage applied */
  markup_percent: z.number().nonneg().default(0),
  /** Notes/terms */
  notes: z.string().default(''),
  /** Valid until date */
  valid_until: z.string().datetime().nullable().default(null),
  /** Who approved this estimate */
  approved_by: z.string().uuid().nullable().default(null),
  approved_at: z.string().datetime().nullable().default(null),
  metadata: z.record(z.unknown()).default({}),
  last_synced_at: z.string().datetime().nullable().default(null),
  created_at: z.string().datetime(),
  updated_at: z.string().datetime(),
});
export type Estimate = z.infer<typeof EstimateSchema>;

/** Change order stub (Phase 1 extensibility — Section 14) */
export const ChangeOrderSchema = z.object({
  id: z.string().uuid(),
  tenant_id: z.string().uuid(),
  project_id: z.string().uuid(),
  /** Reference to original estimate */
  estimate_id: z.string().uuid(),
  /** Change order description */
  description: z.string(),
  /** Status */
  status: z.enum(['draft', 'pending_approval', 'approved', 'rejected']),
  /** Additional cost in cents (can be negative for deductions) */
  amount_cents: z.number().int(),
  /** Who requested the change */
  requested_by: z.string().nullable().default(null),
  approved_by: z.string().uuid().nullable().default(null),
  approved_at: z.string().datetime().nullable().default(null),
  created_at: z.string().datetime(),
  updated_at: z.string().datetime(),
});
export type ChangeOrder = z.infer<typeof ChangeOrderSchema>;

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// src/domain/contact.ts
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

/** Lead scoring tiers from Leads Agent */
export const LeadScore = {
  Hot: 'hot',
  Warm: 'warm',
  Cold: 'cold',
  Disqualified: 'disqualified',
} as const;
export type LeadScore = (typeof LeadScore)[keyof typeof LeadScore];

export const ContactSchema = z.object({
  id: z.string().uuid(),
  tenant_id: z.string().uuid(),
  external_id: z.string().nullable().default(null),
  source: z.nativeEnum(IntegrationService).nullable().default(null),
  /** Contact type */
  contact_type: z.enum(['lead', 'client', 'vendor', 'subcontractor', 'other']),
  /** Full name */
  name: z.string().min(1).max(255),
  /** Email address */
  email: z.string().email().nullable().default(null),
  /** Phone number */
  phone: z.string().nullable().default(null),
  /** Company name */
  company: z.string().nullable().default(null),
  /** Address */
  address: z.object({
    street: z.string().default(''),
    city: z.string().default(''),
    state: z.string().default(''),
    zip: z.string().default(''),
  }).nullable().default(null),
  /** Lead score (Leads Agent) */
  lead_score: z.nativeEnum(LeadScore).nullable().default(null),
  /** Lead source (e.g., 'email', 'referral', 'website') */
  lead_source: z.string().nullable().default(null),
  /** Notes */
  notes: z.string().default(''),
  /** Tags for categorization */
  tags: z.array(z.string()).default([]),
  metadata: z.record(z.unknown()).default({}),
  last_synced_at: z.string().datetime().nullable().default(null),
  created_at: z.string().datetime(),
  updated_at: z.string().datetime(),
});
export type Contact = z.infer<typeof ContactSchema>;

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// src/domain/invoice.ts
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export const PaymentSchema = z.object({
  id: z.string().uuid(),
  tenant_id: z.string().uuid(),
  invoice_id: z.string().uuid(),
  external_id: z.string().nullable().default(null),
  /** Amount in cents */
  amount_cents: z.number().int().nonneg(),
  /** Payment method */
  payment_method: z.enum(['check', 'credit_card', 'ach', 'cash', 'other']),
  /** Payment reference number */
  reference_number: z.string().nullable().default(null),
  /** Payment date */
  payment_date: z.string().datetime(),
  metadata: z.record(z.unknown()).default({}),
  created_at: z.string().datetime(),
});
export type Payment = z.infer<typeof PaymentSchema>;

export const InvoiceSchema = z.object({
  id: z.string().uuid(),
  tenant_id: z.string().uuid(),
  project_id: z.string().uuid(),
  external_id: z.string().nullable().default(null),
  source: z.nativeEnum(IntegrationService).nullable().default(null),
  /** Invoice number */
  invoice_number: z.string(),
  /** Invoice status */
  status: z.enum(['draft', 'sent', 'paid', 'partially_paid', 'overdue', 'voided']),
  /** Invoice date */
  invoice_date: z.string().datetime(),
  /** Due date */
  due_date: z.string().datetime(),
  /** Subtotal in cents */
  subtotal_cents: z.number().int().nonneg(),
  /** Tax in cents */
  tax_cents: z.number().int().nonneg().default(0),
  /** Total in cents */
  total_cents: z.number().int().nonneg(),
  /** Amount paid in cents */
  paid_cents: z.number().int().nonneg().default(0),
  /** Balance due in cents */
  balance_cents: z.number().int().nonneg(),
  /** Line items (JSONB) */
  line_items: z.array(z.record(z.unknown())).default([]),
  /** Notes */
  notes: z.string().default(''),
  metadata: z.record(z.unknown()).default({}),
  last_synced_at: z.string().datetime().nullable().default(null),
  created_at: z.string().datetime(),
  updated_at: z.string().datetime(),
});
export type Invoice = z.infer<typeof InvoiceSchema>;

/** Financial summary (read-only from QuickBooks) */
export const FinancialSummarySchema = z.object({
  /** Period start date */
  period_start: z.string().datetime(),
  /** Period end date */
  period_end: z.string().datetime(),
  /** Total revenue in cents */
  revenue_cents: z.number().int(),
  /** Total expenses in cents */
  expenses_cents: z.number().int(),
  /** Net income in cents */
  net_income_cents: z.number().int(),
  /** Accounts receivable balance in cents */
  ar_balance_cents: z.number().int(),
  /** Accounts payable balance in cents */
  ap_balance_cents: z.number().int(),
  /** Number of overdue invoices */
  overdue_invoice_count: z.number().int().nonneg(),
  /** Total overdue amount in cents */
  overdue_amount_cents: z.number().int().nonneg(),
});
export type FinancialSummary = z.infer<typeof FinancialSummarySchema>;

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// src/domain/notification.ts
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

/** Notification channel preferences */
export const NotificationChannel = {
  InApp: 'in_app',
  Email: 'email',
  Slack: 'slack',
} as const;
export type NotificationChannel = (typeof NotificationChannel)[keyof typeof NotificationChannel];

/** Notification types */
export const NotificationType = {
  EscalationCreated: 'escalation_created',
  DraftReady: 'draft_ready',
  AgentCompleted: 'agent_completed',
  AgentFailed: 'agent_failed',
  IntegrationExpiring: 'integration_expiring',
  IntegrationDisconnected: 'integration_disconnected',
  UsageLimitApproaching: 'usage_limit_approaching',
  UsageLimitReached: 'usage_limit_reached',
  TeamMemberInvited: 'team_member_invited',
  TeamMemberJoined: 'team_member_joined',
  BillingPaymentFailed: 'billing_payment_failed',
  MorningBriefingReady: 'morning_briefing_ready',
  SupportTicketCreated: 'support_ticket_created',
  SystemAlert: 'system_alert',
} as const;
export type NotificationType = (typeof NotificationType)[keyof typeof NotificationType];

export const NotificationSchema = z.object({
  id: z.string().uuid(),
  tenant_id: z.string().uuid(),
  /** Target user (null = broadcast to all tenant members with visibility) */
  user_id: z.string().uuid().nullable(),
  /** Notification type */
  type: z.nativeEnum(NotificationType),
  /** Title */
  title: z.string().min(1).max(255),
  /** Body content */
  body: z.string(),
  /** Whether the notification has been read */
  is_read: z.boolean().default(false),
  /** Action URL for click-through */
  action_url: z.string().nullable().default(null),
  /** Related entity ID (execution_id, escalation_id, etc.) */
  related_entity_id: z.string().uuid().nullable().default(null),
  /** Related entity type */
  related_entity_type: z.string().nullable().default(null),
  /** Channels this notification was delivered to */
  delivered_via: z.array(z.nativeEnum(NotificationChannel)).default(['in_app']),
  created_at: z.string().datetime(),
  read_at: z.string().datetime().nullable().default(null),
});
export type Notification = z.infer<typeof NotificationSchema>;

/** Per-user notification preferences */
export const NotificationPreferencesSchema = z.object({
  id: z.string().uuid(),
  tenant_id: z.string().uuid(),
  user_id: z.string().uuid(),
  /** Per-type channel preferences */
  preferences: z.record(
    z.nativeEnum(NotificationType),
    z.object({
      in_app: z.boolean().default(true),
      email: z.boolean().default(false),
      slack: z.boolean().default(false),
    }),
  ),
  /** Global mute (suppress all notifications) */
  muted: z.boolean().default(false),
  /** Quiet hours */
  quiet_hours: z.object({
    enabled: z.boolean().default(false),
    start: z.string().default('22:00'),
    end: z.string().default('07:00'),
  }).default({}),
  updated_at: z.string().datetime(),
});
export type NotificationPreferences = z.infer<typeof NotificationPreferencesSchema>;

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Support conversation (src/domain/support.ts)
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

/** Support conversation sentiment */
export const SupportSentiment = {
  Positive: 'positive',
  Neutral: 'neutral',
  Frustrated: 'frustrated',
  Angry: 'angry',
} as const;
export type SupportSentiment = (typeof SupportSentiment)[keyof typeof SupportSentiment];

export const SupportMessageSchema = z.object({
  id: z.string().uuid(),
  conversation_id: z.string().uuid(),
  /** Message sender role */
  role: z.enum(['user', 'agent', 'system']),
  /** Message content (markdown supported) */
  content: z.string(),
  /** KB sources cited in this message */
  sources: z.array(z.object({
    article_id: z.string().uuid(),
    article_title: z.string(),
    confidence_score: z.number().min(0).max(1),
    chunk_text: z.string(),
  })).default([]),
  /** Confidence score of the agent response */
  confidence_score: z.number().min(0).max(1).nullable().default(null),
  created_at: z.string().datetime(),
});
export type SupportMessage = z.infer<typeof SupportMessageSchema>;

export const SupportConversationSchema = z.object({
  id: z.string().uuid(),
  tenant_id: z.string().uuid(),
  user_id: z.string().uuid(),
  /** Conversation status */
  status: z.enum(['active', 'resolved', 'escalated', 'archived']),
  /** Detected sentiment */
  sentiment: z.nativeEnum(SupportSentiment).default('neutral' as SupportSentiment),
  /** Whether the user rated this conversation */
  csat_rating: z.number().int().min(1).max(5).nullable().default(null),
  /** Customer effort score (1-7) */
  ces_score: z.number().int().min(1).max(7).nullable().default(null),
  /** Number of messages in the conversation */
  message_count: z.number().int().nonneg().default(0),
  /** Whether the conversation was resolved without human escalation */
  resolved_autonomously: z.boolean().default(false),
  /** Escalation ticket ID if escalated */
  escalation_ticket_id: z.string().nullable().default(null),
  /** User's current route when conversation started */
  context_route: z.string().nullable().default(null),
  /** Topic tags */
  topic_tags: z.array(z.string()).default([]),
  /** Messages (loaded separately via relationship) */
  messages: z.array(SupportMessageSchema).optional(),
  created_at: z.string().datetime(),
  updated_at: z.string().datetime(),
});
export type SupportConversation = z.infer<typeof SupportConversationSchema>;

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Shared types used across domain entities
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

/** Cursor-based pagination (Section 13 UX conventions) */
export const PaginationParamsSchema = z.object({
  /** Cursor for pagination (opaque string, typically base64-encoded ID) */
  cursor: z.string().optional(),
  /** Number of items per page */
  limit: z.number().int().min(1).max(100).default(25),
  /** Sort direction */
  sort_order: z.enum(['asc', 'desc']).default('desc'),
  /** Sort field */
  sort_by: z.string().optional(),
});
export type PaginationParams = z.infer<typeof PaginationParamsSchema>;

export const PaginatedResponseSchema = <T extends z.ZodType>(itemSchema: T) =>
  z.object({
    items: z.array(itemSchema),
    /** Next page cursor (null if no more pages) */
    next_cursor: z.string().nullable(),
    /** Previous page cursor */
    prev_cursor: z.string().nullable(),
    /** Total count of items matching the query */
    total_count: z.number().int().nonneg(),
    /** Whether there are more items */
    has_more: z.boolean(),
  });

/** Standard API error response (RFC 7807 Problem Details) */
export const ApiErrorSchema = z.object({
  /** Error type URI */
  type: z.string().url().default('about:blank'),
  /** HTTP status code */
  status: z.number().int(),
  /** Short summary */
  title: z.string(),
  /** Detailed explanation */
  detail: z.string(),
  /** Request-specific instance identifier */
  instance: z.string().optional(),
  /** Machine-readable error code */
  code: z.string().optional(),
  /** Field-level validation errors */
  errors: z.array(z.object({
    field: z.string(),
    message: z.string(),
    code: z.string(),
  })).optional(),
});
export type ApiError = z.infer<typeof ApiErrorSchema>;

/** Tenant daily usage aggregation */
export const TenantUsageDailySchema = z.object({
  id: z.string().uuid(),
  tenant_id: z.string().uuid(),
  /** Date (YYYY-MM-DD) */
  date: z.string(),
  /** Total agent executions */
  execution_count: z.number().int().nonneg().default(0),
  /** Total AI API calls */
  api_call_count: z.number().int().nonneg().default(0),
  /** Total input tokens */
  input_tokens: z.number().int().nonneg().default(0),
  /** Total output tokens */
  output_tokens: z.number().int().nonneg().default(0),
  /** Total AI cost in USD */
  total_cost_usd: z.number().nonneg().default(0),
  /** Per-agent breakdown (JSONB) */
  agent_breakdown: z.record(z.nativeEnum(AgentType), z.object({
    execution_count: z.number().int().nonneg(),
    api_call_count: z.number().int().nonneg(),
    cost_usd: z.number().nonneg(),
  })).default({}),
  created_at: z.string().datetime(),
});
export type TenantUsageDaily = z.infer<typeof TenantUsageDailySchema>;

/** Webhook event for deduplication */
export const WebhookEventSchema = z.object({
  id: z.string().uuid(),
  tenant_id: z.string().uuid(),
  /** External service name */
  service: z.string(),
  /** External event ID for deduplication */
  external_event_id: z.string(),
  /** Event type */
  event_type: z.string(),
  /** Raw event payload */
  payload: z.record(z.unknown()),
  /** Stripe event created timestamp (for ordering — Section 7) */
  stripe_event_created: z.number().int().nullable().default(null),
  /** Whether this event has been processed */
  processed: z.boolean().default(false),
  created_at: z.string().datetime(),
});
export type WebhookEvent = z.infer<typeof WebhookEventSchema>;

/** Event bus log entry for audit trail */
export const EventBusLogSchema = z.object({
  id: z.string().uuid(),
  tenant_id: z.string().uuid(),
  /** NATS subject */
  subject: z.string(),
  /** Event type */
  event_type: z.string(),
  /** Source agent */
  source_agent: z.nativeEnum(AgentType).nullable(),
  /** Target agent */
  target_agent: z.nativeEnum(AgentType).nullable(),
  /** Event payload */
  payload: z.record(z.unknown()),
  /** Reference to originating agent execution */
  context_ref: z.string().uuid().nullable().default(null),
  created_at: z.string().datetime(),
});
export type EventBusLog = z.infer<typeof EventBusLogSchema>;

/** Calendar availability slot (from Google Calendar freebusy or Microsoft Graph findMeetingTimes) */
export const AvailabilitySlotSchema = z.object({
  start: z.string().datetime(),
  end: z.string().datetime(),
  is_available: z.boolean(),
});
export type AvailabilitySlot = z.infer<typeof AvailabilitySlotSchema>;

/** Plan tier configuration (stored in database, not code — Section 4) */
export const PlanTierConfigSchema = z.object({
  tier: z.nativeEnum(PlanTier),
  /** Monthly price in cents */
  monthly_price_cents: z.number().int().nonneg(),
  /** Setup fee in cents */
  setup_fee_cents: z.number().int().nonneg(),
  /** Maximum number of operational agents */
  max_agents: z.number().int().nonneg(),
  /** Daily API call limit */
  daily_call_limit: z.number().int().nonneg(),
  /** Maximum team member seats */
  max_seats: z.number().int().nonneg(),
  /** Maximum integration count */
  max_integrations: z.number().int().nonneg(),
  /** Monthly AI spend cap in USD */
  ai_spend_cap_usd: z.number().nonneg(),
  /** Side-effecting actions per hour rate limit */
  side_effect_actions_per_hour: z.number().int().nonneg(),
  /** Whether overages are billed at cost (Enterprise) */
  overage_billing: z.boolean().default(false),
  /** Feature flags enabled for this tier */
  features: z.record(z.string(), z.boolean()).default({}),
});
export type PlanTierConfig = z.infer<typeof PlanTierConfigSchema>;


// ============================================================================
// PART 2: API ROUTE DEFINITIONS
// ============================================================================
// All routes are prefixed with /api/v1/ (URL prefix versioning from Day 1).
// Organized by domain. Each route specifies method, path, schemas, auth, and rate limit.

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Rate Limit Tiers (Section 5 + Section 12)
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export const RateLimitTier = {
  /** Auth endpoints: 5-10 req/min/IP */
  Auth: 'auth',
  /** Agent execution: 10 req/min/tenant */
  AgentExecution: 'agent_execution',
  /** Escalation approval: 30 req/min/user */
  EscalationApproval: 'escalation_approval',
  /** Standard authenticated: 100 req/min/user */
  Standard: 'standard',
  /** Webhook ingestion: unlimited (rate limiting via provider) */
  Webhook: 'webhook',
  /** Admin operations: 30 req/min/user */
  Admin: 'admin',
  /** Data export: 1 req/24h/tenant */
  Export: 'export',
} as const;
export type RateLimitTier = (typeof RateLimitTier)[keyof typeof RateLimitTier];

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// 1. Auth Routes — /api/v1/auth/*
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Handled by better-auth with Organization plugin. These define the contract
// that better-auth exposes and the Hono middleware wraps.

export const AuthRoutes = {
  /** POST /api/v1/auth/login — Email/password login */
  login: {
    method: 'POST' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/auth/login',
    request: z.object({
      email: z.string().email(),
      password: z.string().min(8),
    }),
    response: z.object({
      user: UserSchema.omit({ created_at: true, updated_at: true }),
      session: z.object({
        id: z.string(),
        expires_at: z.string().datetime(),
      }),
      /** If MFA is required, redirect to /login/mfa */
      requires_mfa: z.boolean(),
    }),
    auth: null,
    rate_limit: 'auth' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** POST /api/v1/auth/login/mfa — TOTP verification */
  loginMfa: {
    method: 'POST' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/auth/login/mfa',
    request: z.object({
      /** 6-digit TOTP code */
      code: z.string().length(6),
      /** Session ID from login response */
      session_id: z.string(),
    }),
    response: z.object({
      user: UserSchema.omit({ created_at: true, updated_at: true }),
      session: z.object({
        id: z.string(),
        expires_at: z.string().datetime(),
      }),
    }),
    auth: null,
    rate_limit: 'auth' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** POST /api/v1/auth/signup — Owner registration (Phase 2: self-serve) */
  signup: {
    method: 'POST' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/auth/signup',
    request: z.object({
      email: z.string().email(),
      password: z.string().min(8).max(128),
      name: z.string().min(1).max(255),
      company_name: z.string().min(1).max(255),
    }),
    response: z.object({
      user: UserSchema.omit({ created_at: true, updated_at: true }),
      tenant: TenantSchema.pick({ id: true, name: true }),
    }),
    auth: null,
    rate_limit: 'auth' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** POST /api/v1/auth/forgot-password — Request password reset */
  forgotPassword: {
    method: 'POST' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/auth/forgot-password',
    request: z.object({
      email: z.string().email(),
    }),
    /** Always returns 200 regardless of whether email exists (enumeration prevention) */
    response: z.object({
      message: z.literal('If an account exists, a reset link has been sent.'),
    }),
    auth: null,
    rate_limit: 'auth' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** POST /api/v1/auth/reset-password — Set new password with token */
  resetPassword: {
    method: 'POST' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/auth/reset-password',
    request: z.object({
      token: z.string(),
      password: z.string().min(8).max(128),
    }),
    /** Revokes all existing sessions on success */
    response: z.object({
      message: z.literal('Password updated. Please sign in.'),
    }),
    auth: null,
    rate_limit: 'auth' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** POST /api/v1/auth/invite/accept — Accept team invitation */
  acceptInvite: {
    method: 'POST' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/auth/invite/accept',
    request: z.object({
      token: z.string(),
    }),
    response: z.object({
      tenant: TenantSchema.pick({ id: true, name: true }),
      role: z.nativeEnum(TenantRole),
    }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager', 'designer', 'bookkeeper', 'viewer'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'auth' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** POST /api/v1/auth/invite/register — Register new account via invitation */
  registerFromInvite: {
    method: 'POST' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/auth/invite/register',
    request: z.object({
      token: z.string(),
      name: z.string().min(1).max(255),
      password: z.string().min(8).max(128),
    }),
    response: z.object({
      user: UserSchema.omit({ created_at: true, updated_at: true }),
      tenant: TenantSchema.pick({ id: true, name: true }),
      role: z.nativeEnum(TenantRole),
    }),
    auth: null,
    rate_limit: 'auth' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** POST /api/v1/auth/mfa/setup — Enable MFA */
  setupMfa: {
    method: 'POST' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/auth/mfa/setup',
    request: z.object({}),
    response: z.object({
      /** TOTP secret for QR code generation */
      secret: z.string(),
      /** QR code data URI */
      qr_code: z.string(),
      /** Recovery codes (shown once) */
      recovery_codes: z.array(z.string()),
    }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager', 'designer', 'bookkeeper', 'viewer'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** POST /api/v1/auth/mfa/verify — Verify and activate MFA */
  verifyMfa: {
    method: 'POST' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/auth/mfa/verify',
    request: z.object({
      code: z.string().length(6),
    }),
    response: z.object({
      mfa_enabled: z.literal(true),
    }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager', 'designer', 'bookkeeper', 'viewer'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** DELETE /api/v1/auth/session — Logout (revoke current session) */
  logout: {
    method: 'DELETE' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/auth/session',
    request: z.object({}),
    response: z.object({ message: z.literal('Logged out.') }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager', 'designer', 'bookkeeper', 'viewer'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** GET /api/v1/auth/session — Get current session info */
  getSession: {
    method: 'GET' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/auth/session',
    request: z.object({}),
    response: z.object({
      user: UserSchema.omit({ created_at: true, updated_at: true }),
      tenant: TenantSchema.pick({ id: true, name: true, plan: true }),
      role: z.nativeEnum(TenantRole),
    }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager', 'designer', 'bookkeeper', 'viewer'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },
} as const;

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// 2. Tenant Routes — /api/v1/tenants/*
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export const TenantRoutes = {
  /** GET /api/v1/tenants/current — Get current tenant details */
  getCurrent: {
    method: 'GET' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/tenants/current',
    request: z.object({}),
    response: TenantSchema,
    auth: ['owner', 'admin'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** PATCH /api/v1/tenants/current — Update tenant settings */
  updateCurrent: {
    method: 'PATCH' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/tenants/current',
    request: z.object({
      name: z.string().min(1).max(255).optional(),
      timezone: z.string().optional(),
      industry_vertical: z.string().optional(),
      company_size: z.enum(['solo', 'small', 'medium', 'large']).optional(),
    }),
    response: TenantSchema,
    auth: ['owner', 'admin'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** GET /api/v1/tenants/current/feature-flags — Get feature flags */
  getFeatureFlags: {
    method: 'GET' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/tenants/current/feature-flags',
    request: z.object({}),
    response: FeatureFlagSchema,
    auth: ['owner', 'admin'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** GET /api/v1/tenants/current/usage — Get usage summary */
  getUsage: {
    method: 'GET' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/tenants/current/usage',
    query: z.object({
      /** Period: 'today', 'week', 'month', 'custom' */
      period: z.enum(['today', 'week', 'month', 'custom']).default('month'),
      start_date: z.string().optional(),
      end_date: z.string().optional(),
    }),
    response: z.object({
      period: z.object({ start: z.string(), end: z.string() }),
      total_executions: z.number().int(),
      total_api_calls: z.number().int(),
      total_cost_usd: z.number(),
      daily_breakdown: z.array(TenantUsageDailySchema),
      agent_breakdown: z.record(z.nativeEnum(AgentType), z.object({
        execution_count: z.number().int(),
        cost_usd: z.number(),
      })),
      plan_limits: z.object({
        daily_call_limit: z.number().int(),
        daily_calls_used: z.number().int(),
        monthly_ai_spend_cap_usd: z.number(),
        monthly_ai_spend_used_usd: z.number(),
      }),
    }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** POST /api/v1/tenants/current/export — Request data export (CCPA) */
  requestExport: {
    method: 'POST' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/tenants/current/export',
    request: z.object({}),
    response: z.object({
      /** Export job ID */
      export_id: z.string().uuid(),
      /** Estimated completion time */
      estimated_at: z.string().datetime(),
      message: z.literal('Export queued. You will be notified when ready.'),
    }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'export' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** POST /api/v1/tenants/current/onboarding — Update onboarding progress */
  updateOnboarding: {
    method: 'POST' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/tenants/current/onboarding',
    request: z.object({
      step: z.nativeEnum(OnboardingStep),
      data: z.record(z.unknown()).optional(),
    }),
    response: z.object({
      current_step: z.nativeEnum(OnboardingStep),
      completed: z.boolean(),
    }),
    auth: ['owner'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },
} as const;

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// 3. Agent Routes — /api/v1/agents/*
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export const AgentRoutes = {
  /** GET /api/v1/agents — List agents for current tenant */
  list: {
    method: 'GET' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/agents',
    query: z.object({
      /** Filter by active status */
      is_active: z.coerce.boolean().optional(),
    }),
    response: z.object({
      agents: z.array(AgentSchema),
    }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** GET /api/v1/agents/:agentId — Get agent detail */
  getById: {
    method: 'GET' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/agents/:agentId',
    response: AgentSchema,
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** POST /api/v1/agents/:agentId/execute — Trigger agent execution (manual) */
  triggerExecution: {
    method: 'POST' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/agents/:agentId/execute',
    request: z.object({
      /** Input parameters for the execution (agent-type-specific) */
      input: z.record(z.unknown()).default({}),
      /** Priority override */
      priority: z.enum(['high', 'medium', 'low']).default('medium'),
    }),
    response: z.object({
      /** Execution ID for tracking */
      execution_id: z.string().uuid(),
      /** BullMQ job ID */
      job_id: z.string(),
      status: z.literal('QUEUED'),
      message: z.literal('Agent execution queued.'),
    }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'agent_execution' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** PATCH /api/v1/agents/:agentId — Update agent configuration */
  update: {
    method: 'PATCH' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/agents/:agentId',
    request: z.object({
      is_active: z.boolean().optional(),
      name: z.string().min(1).max(255).optional(),
      agent_config: z.record(z.unknown()).optional(),
      triggers: z.array(TriggerConfigSchema).optional(),
    }),
    response: AgentSchema,
    auth: ['owner', 'admin'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** GET /api/v1/agents/:agentId/status — Get real-time agent status */
  getStatus: {
    method: 'GET' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/agents/:agentId/status',
    response: z.object({
      agent_id: z.string().uuid(),
      is_active: z.boolean(),
      /** Current execution (if running) */
      current_execution: AgentExecutionSchema.pick({
        id: true,
        status: true,
        step_count: true,
        started_at: true,
      }).nullable(),
      /** Last completed execution */
      last_execution: AgentExecutionSchema.pick({
        id: true,
        status: true,
        completed_at: true,
        total_cost_usd: true,
      }).nullable(),
      /** Executions today */
      executions_today: z.number().int().nonneg(),
      /** Quality metrics */
      approval_rate_7d: z.number().min(0).max(1).nullable(),
      escalation_rate_7d: z.number().min(0).max(1).nullable(),
    }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** GET /api/v1/agents/:agentId/execute/stream — SSE stream for agent execution */
  streamExecution: {
    method: 'GET' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/agents/:agentId/execute/stream',
    query: z.object({
      execution_id: z.string().uuid(),
    }),
    /** Server-Sent Events stream. Headers: X-Accel-Buffering: no (CF-01) */
    response: z.object({
      /** Stream of execution step events (SSE) */
      event_type: z.enum(['step_start', 'step_complete', 'tool_call', 'token', 'complete', 'error']),
      data: z.record(z.unknown()),
    }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },
} as const;

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// 4. Execution Routes — /api/v1/executions/*
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export const ExecutionRoutes = {
  /** GET /api/v1/executions — List executions with filters */
  list: {
    method: 'GET' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/executions',
    query: PaginationParamsSchema.extend({
      /** Filter by agent type */
      agent_type: z.nativeEnum(AgentType).optional(),
      /** Filter by status */
      status: z.nativeEnum(ExecutionStatus).optional(),
      /** Filter by trigger type */
      trigger_type: TriggerTypeSchema.optional(),
      /** Date range start */
      from: z.string().datetime().optional(),
      /** Date range end */
      to: z.string().datetime().optional(),
    }),
    response: PaginatedResponseSchema(AgentExecutionSchema),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** GET /api/v1/executions/:executionId — Get execution detail */
  getById: {
    method: 'GET' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/executions/:executionId',
    response: AgentExecutionSchema,
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** POST /api/v1/executions/:executionId/cancel — Cancel a queued execution */
  cancel: {
    method: 'POST' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/executions/:executionId/cancel',
    request: z.object({}),
    response: z.object({
      execution_id: z.string().uuid(),
      status: z.literal('CANCELLED'),
    }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** POST /api/v1/executions/:executionId/retry — Retry a failed execution */
  retry: {
    method: 'POST' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/executions/:executionId/retry',
    request: z.object({}),
    response: z.object({
      /** New execution ID */
      execution_id: z.string().uuid(),
      /** New BullMQ job ID */
      job_id: z.string(),
      status: z.literal('QUEUED'),
    }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'agent_execution' as RateLimitTier,
  },
} as const;

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// 5. Escalation Routes — /api/v1/escalations/*
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export const EscalationRoutes = {
  /** GET /api/v1/escalations — List escalations (prioritized queue) */
  list: {
    method: 'GET' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/escalations',
    query: PaginationParamsSchema.extend({
      status: z.nativeEnum(EscalationStatus).optional(),
      severity: z.nativeEnum(EscalationSeverity).optional(),
      agent_type: z.nativeEnum(AgentType).optional(),
    }),
    response: PaginatedResponseSchema(EscalationSchema),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** GET /api/v1/escalations/:escalationId — Get escalation detail */
  getById: {
    method: 'GET' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/escalations/:escalationId',
