    response: EscalationSchema,
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** POST /api/v1/escalations/:escalationId/approve — Approve escalation */
  approve: {
    method: 'POST' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/escalations/:escalationId/approve',
    request: z.object({
      notes: z.string().optional(),
    }),
    response: z.object({
      escalation_id: z.string().uuid(),
      status: z.literal('approved'),
      /** Execution ID of the follow-up action */
      action_execution_id: z.string().uuid().optional(),
    }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'escalation_approval' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** POST /api/v1/escalations/:escalationId/reject — Reject escalation */
  reject: {
    method: 'POST' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/escalations/:escalationId/reject',
    request: z.object({
      reason: z.string().min(1),
    }),
    response: z.object({
      escalation_id: z.string().uuid(),
      status: z.literal('rejected'),
    }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'escalation_approval' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** POST /api/v1/escalations/:escalationId/modify — Modify and approve */
  modify: {
    method: 'POST' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/escalations/:escalationId/modify',
    request: z.object({
      /** Modified action payload */
      modified_action: z.record(z.unknown()),
      notes: z.string().optional(),
    }),
    response: z.object({
      escalation_id: z.string().uuid(),
      status: z.literal('modified'),
      action_execution_id: z.string().uuid().optional(),
    }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'escalation_approval' as RateLimitTier,
  },
} as const;

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// 6. Draft Routes — /api/v1/drafts/*
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export const DraftRoutes = {
  /** GET /api/v1/drafts — List pending drafts */
  list: {
    method: 'GET' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/drafts',
    query: PaginationParamsSchema.extend({
      status: z.nativeEnum(DraftStatus).optional(),
      content_type: z.nativeEnum(DraftContentType).optional(),
      agent_type: z.nativeEnum(AgentType).optional(),
    }),
    response: PaginatedResponseSchema(DraftSchema),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** GET /api/v1/drafts/:draftId — Get draft detail */
  getById: {
    method: 'GET' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/drafts/:draftId',
    response: DraftSchema,
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** POST /api/v1/drafts/:draftId/approve — Approve a draft */
  approve: {
    method: 'POST' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/drafts/:draftId/approve',
    request: z.object({
      notes: z.string().optional(),
    }),
    response: z.object({
      draft_id: z.string().uuid(),
      status: z.literal('approved'),
    }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** POST /api/v1/drafts/:draftId/reject — Reject a draft */
  reject: {
    method: 'POST' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/drafts/:draftId/reject',
    request: z.object({
      reason: z.string().min(1),
    }),
    response: z.object({
      draft_id: z.string().uuid(),
      status: z.literal('rejected'),
    }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** PATCH /api/v1/drafts/:draftId — Edit a draft before approval */
  edit: {
    method: 'PATCH' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/drafts/:draftId',
    request: z.object({
      /** Modified content */
      content: z.record(z.unknown()),
    }),
    response: DraftSchema,
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },
} as const;

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// 7. Integration Routes — /api/v1/integrations/*
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export const IntegrationRoutes = {
  /** GET /api/v1/integrations — List connected integrations */
  list: {
    method: 'GET' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/integrations',
    response: z.object({
      integrations: z.array(
        IntegrationSchema.omit({ encrypted_credentials: true }),
      ),
    }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** POST /api/v1/integrations/:service/connect — Initiate OAuth flow or API key connection */
  connect: {
    method: 'POST' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/integrations/:service/connect',
    request: z.object({
      /** For API key auth: the key value */
      api_key: z.string().optional(),
      /** OAuth redirect URI override */
      redirect_uri: z.string().url().optional(),
    }),
    response: z.discriminatedUnion('type', [
      z.object({
        type: z.literal('oauth_redirect'),
        /** URL to redirect the user to for OAuth consent */
        redirect_url: z.string().url(),
      }),
      z.object({
        type: z.literal('connected'),
        integration: IntegrationSchema.omit({ encrypted_credentials: true }),
      }),
    ]),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** GET /api/v1/integrations/:service/callback — OAuth callback handler */
  oauthCallback: {
    method: 'GET' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/integrations/:service/callback',
    query: z.object({
      code: z.string(),
      state: z.string(),
    }),
    response: z.object({
      integration: IntegrationSchema.omit({ encrypted_credentials: true }),
    }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** DELETE /api/v1/integrations/:service/disconnect — Disconnect integration */
  disconnect: {
    method: 'DELETE' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/integrations/:service/disconnect',
    request: z.object({}),
    response: z.object({
      message: z.literal('Integration disconnected.'),
    }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** GET /api/v1/integrations/:service/status — Get sync status */
  getStatus: {
    method: 'GET' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/integrations/:service/status',
    response: z.object({
      service: z.nativeEnum(IntegrationService),
      status: z.nativeEnum(IntegrationStatus),
      last_sync_at: z.string().datetime().nullable(),
      last_sync_error: z.string().nullable(),
      /** Time until access token expires */
      token_expires_in_seconds: z.number().int().nullable(),
      /** Data sync details */
      sync_details: z.object({
        projects_synced: z.number().int().nonneg(),
        contacts_synced: z.number().int().nonneg(),
        last_full_sync: z.string().datetime().nullable(),
      }).optional(),
    }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** POST /api/v1/integrations/:service/sync — Force sync */
  forceSync: {
    method: 'POST' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/integrations/:service/sync',
    request: z.object({
      /** What to sync */
      scope: z.enum(['full', 'incremental']).default('incremental'),
    }),
    response: z.object({
      sync_job_id: z.string().uuid(),
      message: z.literal('Sync queued.'),
    }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },
} as const;

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Webhook receiver routes (not authenticated via session — use service-specific verification)
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export const WebhookRoutes = {
  /** POST /webhooks/stripe/:webhookToken — Stripe webhook receiver */
  stripe: {
    method: 'POST' as const,
    path: '/webhooks/stripe/:webhookToken',
    /** Verified via stripe.webhooks.constructEvent(body, sig, secret) */
    description: 'Stripe webhook. Signature verified via stripe-signature header.',
    events: [
      'customer.subscription.created',
      'customer.subscription.updated',
      'customer.subscription.deleted',
      'invoice.payment_succeeded',
      'invoice.payment_failed',
      'customer.updated',
    ],
  },

  /** POST /webhooks/sendgrid/:webhookToken — SendGrid Inbound Parse */
  sendgrid: {
    method: 'POST' as const,
    path: '/webhooks/sendgrid/:webhookToken',
    /** Verified via unguessable URL token + basic auth */
    description: 'SendGrid Inbound Parse webhook. URL token auth + basic auth.',
  },

  /** POST /webhooks/jobtread/:webhookToken — JobTread webhook */
  jobtread: {
    method: 'POST' as const,
    path: '/webhooks/jobtread/:webhookToken',
    /** Verified via URL token + IP allowlisting */
    description: 'JobTread webhook. URL token auth + IP allowlist.',
  },

  /** POST /webhooks/quickbooks/:webhookToken — QuickBooks webhook */
  quickbooks: {
    method: 'POST' as const,
    path: '/webhooks/quickbooks/:webhookToken',
    /** Verified via intuit-signature header HMAC-SHA256 */
    description: 'QuickBooks webhook. HMAC-SHA256 via intuit-signature header.',
  },

  /** POST /webhooks/google/:webhookToken — Google Calendar webhook */
  googleCalendar: {
    method: 'POST' as const,
    path: '/webhooks/google/:webhookToken',
    /** Verified via X-Goog-Channel-Token matching */
    description: 'Google Calendar webhook. X-Goog-Channel-Token verification.',
  },

  /** POST /webhooks/microsoft/:webhookToken — Microsoft Graph webhook (Outlook Email + Calendar) */
  microsoftGraph: {
    method: 'POST' as const,
    path: '/webhooks/microsoft/:webhookToken',
    /** Verified via clientState matching + validationToken echo on subscription creation */
    description: 'Microsoft Graph subscription webhook. clientState verification. Handles both Outlook Email and Calendar change notifications. Must echo validationToken on subscription creation/renewal.',
  },
} as const;

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// 8. Support Routes — /api/v1/support/*
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export const SupportRoutes = {
  /** POST /api/v1/support/conversations — Create new support conversation */
  createConversation: {
    method: 'POST' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/support/conversations',
    request: z.object({
      /** Initial message */
      message: z.string().min(1).max(5000),
      /** Current route for context injection */
      context_route: z.string().optional(),
    }),
    response: z.object({
      conversation: SupportConversationSchema,
      /** First agent response */
      agent_response: SupportMessageSchema,
    }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager', 'designer', 'bookkeeper', 'viewer'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** POST /api/v1/support/conversations/:conversationId/messages — Send message */
  sendMessage: {
    method: 'POST' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/support/conversations/:conversationId/messages',
    request: z.object({
      message: z.string().min(1).max(5000),
    }),
    response: z.object({
      user_message: SupportMessageSchema,
      agent_response: SupportMessageSchema,
    }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager', 'designer', 'bookkeeper', 'viewer'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** GET /api/v1/support/conversations — List user's conversations */
  listConversations: {
    method: 'GET' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/support/conversations',
    query: PaginationParamsSchema.extend({
      status: z.enum(['active', 'resolved', 'escalated', 'archived']).optional(),
    }),
    response: PaginatedResponseSchema(SupportConversationSchema),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager', 'designer', 'bookkeeper', 'viewer'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** GET /api/v1/support/conversations/:conversationId — Get conversation with messages */
  getConversation: {
    method: 'GET' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/support/conversations/:conversationId',
    response: SupportConversationSchema.extend({
      messages: z.array(SupportMessageSchema),
    }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager', 'designer', 'bookkeeper', 'viewer'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** POST /api/v1/support/conversations/:conversationId/rate — Rate conversation */
  rateConversation: {
    method: 'POST' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/support/conversations/:conversationId/rate',
    request: z.object({
      /** CSAT: 1-5 */
      csat_rating: z.number().int().min(1).max(5),
      /** CES: 1-7 (optional) */
      ces_score: z.number().int().min(1).max(7).optional(),
    }),
    response: z.object({
      message: z.literal('Thank you for your feedback.'),
    }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager', 'designer', 'bookkeeper', 'viewer'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** GET /api/v1/support/analytics — Support analytics (admin) */
  getAnalytics: {
    method: 'GET' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/support/analytics',
    query: z.object({
      period: z.enum(['week', 'month', 'quarter']).default('month'),
    }),
    response: z.object({
      avg_csat: z.number().nullable(),
      resolution_rate: z.number().min(0).max(1),
      containment_rate: z.number().min(0).max(1),
      avg_ces: z.number().nullable(),
      avg_cost_per_resolution_usd: z.number(),
      avg_response_time_ms: z.number(),
      escalation_rate: z.number().min(0).max(1),
      total_conversations: z.number().int(),
      /** Top unanswered topics for content gap detection */
      content_gaps: z.array(z.object({
        topic: z.string(),
        count: z.number().int(),
      })),
    }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },
} as const;

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// 8b. Help Bot Routes — /api/v1/help/*
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export const HelpRoutes = {
  /** POST /api/v1/help — Send a help query (streamed response via SSE) */
  query: {
    method: 'POST' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/help',
    request: z.object({
      /** User's question */
      message: z.string().min(1).max(2000),
      /** Current route for context-aware suggestions */
      route: z.string(),
      /** User's role for RBAC-aware responses */
      role: z.nativeEnum(TenantRole),
    }),
    response: z.object({
      /** Streamed via SSE (AI SDK streamText) */
      text: z.string(),
      /** Optional deep links for actionable responses */
      action_links: z.array(z.object({
        label: z.string(),
        href: z.string(),
      })).optional(),
      /** Conversation ID for feedback tracking */
      conversation_id: z.string().uuid(),
      message_id: z.string().uuid(),
    }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager', 'designer', 'bookkeeper', 'viewer'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** POST /api/v1/help/:messageId/feedback — Submit thumbs up/down */
  feedback: {
    method: 'POST' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/help/:messageId/feedback',
    request: z.object({
      helpful: z.boolean(),
    }),
    response: z.object({
      message: z.literal('Feedback recorded.'),
    }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager', 'designer', 'bookkeeper', 'viewer'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },
} as const;

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// 9. Notification Routes — /api/v1/notifications/*
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export const NotificationRoutes = {
  /** GET /api/v1/notifications — List notifications */
  list: {
    method: 'GET' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/notifications',
    query: PaginationParamsSchema.extend({
      is_read: z.coerce.boolean().optional(),
      type: z.nativeEnum(NotificationType).optional(),
    }),
    response: PaginatedResponseSchema(NotificationSchema),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager', 'designer', 'bookkeeper', 'viewer'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** GET /api/v1/notifications/unread-count — Get unread count for badge */
  getUnreadCount: {
    method: 'GET' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/notifications/unread-count',
    response: z.object({
      count: z.number().int().nonneg(),
    }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager', 'designer', 'bookkeeper', 'viewer'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** PATCH /api/v1/notifications/:notificationId/read — Mark as read */
  markRead: {
    method: 'PATCH' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/notifications/:notificationId/read',
    request: z.object({}),
    response: z.object({ id: z.string().uuid(), is_read: z.literal(true) }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager', 'designer', 'bookkeeper', 'viewer'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** POST /api/v1/notifications/mark-all-read — Mark all as read */
  markAllRead: {
    method: 'POST' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/notifications/mark-all-read',
    request: z.object({}),
    response: z.object({ updated_count: z.number().int() }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager', 'designer', 'bookkeeper', 'viewer'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** GET /api/v1/notifications/preferences — Get notification preferences */
  getPreferences: {
    method: 'GET' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/notifications/preferences',
    response: NotificationPreferencesSchema,
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager', 'designer', 'bookkeeper', 'viewer'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** PUT /api/v1/notifications/preferences — Update notification preferences */
  updatePreferences: {
    method: 'PUT' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/notifications/preferences',
    request: NotificationPreferencesSchema.omit({ id: true, tenant_id: true, user_id: true, updated_at: true }),
    response: NotificationPreferencesSchema,
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager', 'designer', 'bookkeeper', 'viewer'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },
} as const;

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// 10. Admin Routes — /api/v1/admin/*
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export const AdminRoutes = {
  /** GET /api/v1/admin/tenants — List all tenants (platform admin) */
  listTenants: {
    method: 'GET' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/admin/tenants',
    query: PaginationParamsSchema.extend({
      plan: z.nativeEnum(PlanTier).optional(),
      billing_status: z.nativeEnum(BillingStatus).optional(),
      search: z.string().optional(),
    }),
    response: PaginatedResponseSchema(TenantSchema),
    auth: ['owner'] as TenantRole[], // Platform admin only
    rate_limit: 'admin' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** GET /api/v1/admin/tenants/:tenantId — Get tenant detail */
  getTenant: {
    method: 'GET' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/admin/tenants/:tenantId',
    response: TenantSchema.extend({
      member_count: z.number().int(),
      active_agent_count: z.number().int(),
      monthly_ai_spend_usd: z.number(),
    }),
    auth: ['owner'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'admin' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** GET /api/v1/admin/dashboard — Platform usage dashboard */
  getDashboard: {
    method: 'GET' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/admin/dashboard',
    response: z.object({
      total_tenants: z.number().int(),
      active_tenants: z.number().int(),
      total_executions_today: z.number().int(),
      total_ai_cost_today_usd: z.number(),
      total_mrr_cents: z.number().int(),
      /** System health */
      system_health: z.object({
        ai_gateway_healthy: z.boolean(),
        nats_healthy: z.boolean(),
        valkey_healthy: z.boolean(),
        supabase_healthy: z.boolean(),
        bullmq_dlq_depth: z.number().int(),
      }),
    }),
    auth: ['owner'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'admin' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** PATCH /api/v1/admin/tenants/:tenantId/feature-flags — Update feature flags */
  updateFeatureFlags: {
    method: 'PATCH' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/admin/tenants/:tenantId/feature-flags',
    request: FeatureFlagSchema,
    response: FeatureFlagSchema,
    auth: ['owner'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'admin' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** GET /api/v1/admin/dlq — List dead letter queue jobs */
  listDlq: {
    method: 'GET' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/admin/dlq',
    query: PaginationParamsSchema,
    response: PaginatedResponseSchema(z.object({
      job_id: z.string(),
      tenant_id: z.string().uuid(),
      agent_type: z.nativeEnum(AgentType),
      failed_reason: z.string(),
      attempts: z.number().int(),
      data: z.record(z.unknown()),
      failed_at: z.string().datetime(),
    })),
    auth: ['owner'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'admin' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** POST /api/v1/admin/dlq/:jobId/retry — Retry a DLQ job */
  retryDlqJob: {
    method: 'POST' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/admin/dlq/:jobId/retry',
    request: z.object({}),
    response: z.object({ new_job_id: z.string(), status: z.literal('QUEUED') }),
    auth: ['owner'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'admin' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** DELETE /api/v1/admin/dlq/:jobId — Dismiss a DLQ job */
  dismissDlqJob: {
    method: 'DELETE' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/admin/dlq/:jobId',
    request: z.object({}),
    response: z.object({ message: z.literal('Job dismissed.') }),
    auth: ['owner'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'admin' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** GET /api/v1/admin/system/config — Get system configuration */
  getSystemConfig: {
    method: 'GET' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/admin/system/config',
    response: z.object({
      ai_gateway_models: z.array(z.object({
        model_name: z.string(),
        provider: z.string(),
        active: z.boolean(),
      })),
      plan_tiers: z.array(PlanTierConfigSchema),
    }),
    auth: ['owner'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'admin' as RateLimitTier,
  },
} as const;

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Team Management Routes — /api/v1/team/*
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export const TeamRoutes = {
  /** GET /api/v1/team/members — List team members */
  listMembers: {
    method: 'GET' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/team/members',
    query: PaginationParamsSchema.extend({
      role: z.nativeEnum(TenantRole).optional(),
      search: z.string().optional(),
    }),
    response: PaginatedResponseSchema(
      TenantMemberSchema.extend({
        user: UserSchema.pick({ name: true, email: true, avatar_url: true }),
      }),
    ),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** POST /api/v1/team/invite — Invite a team member */
  invite: {
    method: 'POST' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/team/invite',
    request: z.object({
      email: z.string().email(),
      role: z.nativeEnum(TenantRole),
      message: z.string().optional(),
    }),
    response: z.object({
      invitation_id: z.string().uuid(),
      message: z.literal('Invitation sent.'),
    }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** PATCH /api/v1/team/members/:memberId — Update member role */
  updateMember: {
    method: 'PATCH' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/team/members/:memberId',
    request: z.object({
      role: z.nativeEnum(TenantRole).optional(),
      is_active: z.boolean().optional(),
    }),
    response: TenantMemberSchema,
    auth: ['owner', 'admin'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** DELETE /api/v1/team/members/:memberId — Remove team member */
  removeMember: {
    method: 'DELETE' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/team/members/:memberId',
    /** Revokes all sessions for the removed user */
    request: z.object({}),
    response: z.object({ message: z.literal('Member removed.') }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },
} as const;

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// 11. Billing Routes — /api/v1/billing/*
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export const BillingRoutes = {
  /** GET /api/v1/billing/current — Get current plan and billing info */
  getCurrent: {
    method: 'GET' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/billing/current',
    response: z.object({
      plan: z.nativeEnum(PlanTier),
      billing_status: z.nativeEnum(BillingStatus),
      /** Current billing period */
      current_period: z.object({
        start: z.string().datetime(),
        end: z.string().datetime(),
      }),
      /** Monthly price in cents */
      monthly_price_cents: z.number().int(),
      /** Next invoice date */
      next_invoice_date: z.string().datetime().nullable(),
      /** Payment method info (masked) */
      payment_method: z.object({
        type: z.string(),
        last4: z.string(),
        exp_month: z.number().int(),
        exp_year: z.number().int(),
      }).nullable(),
      /** Usage this billing period */
      usage: z.object({
        ai_spend_usd: z.number(),
        ai_spend_cap_usd: z.number(),
        api_calls_today: z.number().int(),
        api_calls_limit: z.number().int(),
      }),
    }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** GET /api/v1/billing/invoices — List invoices */
  listInvoices: {
    method: 'GET' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/billing/invoices',
    query: PaginationParamsSchema,
    response: PaginatedResponseSchema(z.object({
      id: z.string(),
      /** Invoice date */
      date: z.string().datetime(),
      /** Amount in cents */
      amount_cents: z.number().int(),
      /** Status */
      status: z.enum(['paid', 'open', 'void', 'uncollectible']),
      /** Stripe-hosted invoice URL */
      invoice_url: z.string().url(),
      /** PDF download URL */
      pdf_url: z.string().url().nullable(),
    })),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** POST /api/v1/billing/portal — Create Stripe customer portal session */
  createPortalSession: {
    method: 'POST' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/billing/portal',
    request: z.object({
      return_url: z.string().url(),
    }),
    response: z.object({
      portal_url: z.string().url(),
    }),
    auth: ['owner'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** POST /api/v1/billing/upgrade — Upgrade or downgrade plan */
  changePlan: {
    method: 'POST' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/billing/change-plan',
    request: z.object({
      new_plan: z.nativeEnum(PlanTier),
    }),
    response: z.object({
      plan: z.nativeEnum(PlanTier),
      effective_at: z.string().datetime(),
      message: z.string(),
    }),
    auth: ['owner'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** GET /api/v1/billing/usage — Detailed usage breakdown */
  getUsageBreakdown: {
    method: 'GET' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/billing/usage',
    query: z.object({
      period: z.enum(['current', 'previous']).default('current'),
    }),
    response: z.object({
      period: z.object({ start: z.string(), end: z.string() }),
      total_cost_usd: z.number(),
      per_agent: z.array(z.object({
        agent_type: z.nativeEnum(AgentType),
        execution_count: z.number().int(),
        total_tokens: z.number().int(),
        cost_usd: z.number(),
      })),
      daily: z.array(z.object({
        date: z.string(),
        cost_usd: z.number(),
        execution_count: z.number().int(),
      })),
    }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },
} as const;

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Data Import Routes — /api/v1/import/*
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export const ImportRoutes = {
  /** POST /api/v1/import/csv — Upload CSV for import */
  uploadCsv: {
    method: 'POST' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/import/csv',
    request: z.object({
      /** Entity type to import */
      entity_type: z.enum(['projects', 'contacts', 'estimates']),
      /** Column mapping: CSV header -> canonical field name */
      column_mapping: z.record(z.string(), z.string()),
      /** Whether to validate only (dry run) */
      dry_run: z.boolean().default(true),
    }),
    /** Multipart form data with CSV file */
    response: z.object({
      /** Validation result */
      valid_rows: z.number().int(),
      invalid_rows: z.number().int(),
      errors: z.array(z.object({
        row: z.number().int(),
        field: z.string(),
        message: z.string(),
      })),
      /** Import job ID (if not dry_run) */
      import_job_id: z.string().uuid().optional(),
    }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** POST /api/v1/import/csv/:importJobId/confirm — Confirm and execute import */
  confirmCsvImport: {
    method: 'POST' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/import/csv/:importJobId/confirm',
    request: z.object({}),
    response: z.object({
      import_job_id: z.string().uuid(),
      status: z.literal('processing'),
      message: z.literal('Import started. Progress updates via Socket.io.'),
    }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },
} as const;

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Profile & Settings Routes — /api/v1/profile/*
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export const ProfileRoutes = {
  /** GET /api/v1/profile — Get current user profile */
  getProfile: {
    method: 'GET' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/profile',
    response: UserSchema.extend({
      role: z.nativeEnum(TenantRole),
      tenant_name: z.string(),
    }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager', 'designer', 'bookkeeper', 'viewer'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** PATCH /api/v1/profile — Update profile */
  updateProfile: {
    method: 'PATCH' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/profile',
    request: z.object({
      name: z.string().min(1).max(255).optional(),
      avatar_url: z.string().url().nullable().optional(),
    }),
    response: UserSchema,
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager', 'designer', 'bookkeeper', 'viewer'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** POST /api/v1/profile/change-password — Change password */
  changePassword: {
    method: 'POST' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/profile/change-password',
    request: z.object({
      current_password: z.string(),
      new_password: z.string().min(8).max(128),
    }),
    /** Revokes all sessions except current */
    response: z.object({ message: z.literal('Password changed.') }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager', 'designer', 'bookkeeper', 'viewer'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'auth' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** GET /api/v1/profile/sessions — List active sessions */
  listSessions: {
    method: 'GET' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/profile/sessions',
    response: z.object({
      sessions: z.array(z.object({
        id: z.string(),
        ip_address: z.string(),
        user_agent: z.string(),
        created_at: z.string().datetime(),
        is_current: z.boolean(),
      })),
    }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager', 'designer', 'bookkeeper', 'viewer'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** DELETE /api/v1/profile/sessions/:sessionId — Revoke a session */
  revokeSession: {
    method: 'DELETE' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/profile/sessions/:sessionId',
    request: z.object({}),
    response: z.object({ message: z.literal('Session revoked.') }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager', 'designer', 'bookkeeper', 'viewer'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },
} as const;

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Health Check Routes (Section 12 — MON-03)
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export const HealthRoutes = {
  /** GET /health/live — Process liveness (Docker HEALTHCHECK + LB liveness) */
  live: {
    method: 'GET' as const,
    path: '/health/live',
    response: z.object({ status: z.literal('ok') }),
  },

  /** GET /health/ready — Readiness (LB readiness probe) */
  ready: {
    method: 'GET' as const,
    path: '/health/ready',
    response: z.object({
      status: z.enum(['ok', 'degraded']),
      checks: z.object({
        database: z.enum(['ok', 'error']),
        nats: z.enum(['ok', 'error']),
        valkey: z.enum(['ok', 'error']),
        ai_gateway: z.enum(['ok', 'error']),
        socket_io: z.enum(['ok', 'error']),
        kb_python: z.enum(['ok', 'unavailable']).optional(),
      }),
    }),
  },

  /** GET /health/startup — One-time startup check */
  startup: {
    method: 'GET' as const,
    path: '/health/startup',
    response: z.object({
      status: z.enum(['ok', 'initializing']),
      migrations_applied: z.boolean(),
      nats_subjects_created: z.boolean(),
      bullmq_workers_registered: z.boolean(),
    }),
  },

  /** GET /metrics — Prometheus metrics scrape endpoint (MON-04) */
  metrics: {
    method: 'GET' as const,
    path: '/metrics',
    /** Returns Prometheus text format */
    description: 'BullMQ queue metrics + custom app metrics in Prometheus exposition format.',
  },
} as const;

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Knowledge Base (Support Admin) Routes — /api/v1/kb/*
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export const KnowledgeBaseRoutes = {
  /** GET /api/v1/kb/articles — List KB articles */
  listArticles: {
    method: 'GET' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/kb/articles',
    query: PaginationParamsSchema.extend({
      status: z.enum(['draft', 'published', 'archived']).optional(),
      category: z.string().optional(),
      search: z.string().optional(),
    }),
    response: PaginatedResponseSchema(z.object({
      id: z.string().uuid(),
      title: z.string(),
      category: z.string(),
      status: z.enum(['draft', 'published', 'archived']),
      version: z.number().int(),
      updated_at: z.string().datetime(),
    })),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** POST /api/v1/kb/articles — Create KB article */
  createArticle: {
    method: 'POST' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/kb/articles',
    request: z.object({
      title: z.string().min(1).max(500),
      content: z.string(),
      category: z.string(),
      tags: z.array(z.string()).default([]),
      /** Publish immediately or save as draft */
      status: z.enum(['draft', 'published']).default('draft'),
    }),
    response: z.object({
      id: z.string().uuid(),
      /** Embedding job ID (if published) */
      embedding_job_id: z.string().uuid().optional(),
    }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },

  /** PUT /api/v1/kb/articles/:articleId — Update KB article */
  updateArticle: {
    method: 'PUT' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/kb/articles/:articleId',
    request: z.object({
      title: z.string().min(1).max(500).optional(),
      content: z.string().optional(),
      category: z.string().optional(),
      tags: z.array(z.string()).optional(),
      status: z.enum(['draft', 'published', 'archived']).optional(),
    }),
    response: z.object({
      id: z.string().uuid(),
      version: z.number().int(),
      /** Diff-based re-embedding job ID */
      embedding_job_id: z.string().uuid().optional(),
    }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },
} as const;

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Customer Routes — /api/v1/customers/*
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export const CustomerRoutes = {
  /** GET /api/v1/customers — List customers with search/filters */
  list: {
    method: 'GET' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/customers',
    query: PaginationParamsSchema.extend({
      search: z.string().optional(),
      source: z.enum(['quickbooks', 'jobtread', 'manual']).optional(),
    }),
    response: PaginatedResponseSchema(z.object({
      id: z.string().uuid(), name: z.string(), email: z.string().email().nullable(),
      phone: z.string().nullable(), source: z.enum(['quickbooks', 'jobtread', 'manual']),
      project_count: z.number().int(), created_at: z.string().datetime(),
    })),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager', 'designer', 'bookkeeper', 'viewer'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },
  /** GET /api/v1/customers/:id — Customer detail */
  get: { method: 'GET' as const, path: '/api/v1/customers/:id',
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager', 'designer', 'bookkeeper', 'viewer'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier },
  /** POST /api/v1/customers — Create customer */
  create: { method: 'POST' as const, path: '/api/v1/customers',
    request: z.object({ name: z.string().min(1).max(255), email: z.string().email().optional(),
      phone: z.string().optional(), address: z.string().optional(), notes: z.string().optional() }),
    response: z.object({ id: z.string().uuid() }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager'] as TenantRole[], rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier },
  /** PUT /api/v1/customers/:id — Update customer */
  update: { method: 'PUT' as const, path: '/api/v1/customers/:id',
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager'] as TenantRole[], rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier },
} as const;

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Project Routes — /api/v1/projects/*
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export const ProjectRoutes = {
  /** GET /api/v1/projects — List projects with status/search filters */
  list: {
    method: 'GET' as const,
    path: '/api/v1/projects',
    query: PaginationParamsSchema.extend({
      search: z.string().optional(),
      status: z.enum(['active', 'completed', 'on_hold', 'cancelled']).optional(),
      customer_id: z.string().uuid().optional(),
    }),
    response: PaginatedResponseSchema(z.object({
      id: z.string().uuid(), name: z.string(), status: z.string(),
      customer_name: z.string().nullable(), budget: z.number().nullable(),
      start_date: z.string().datetime().nullable(), due_date: z.string().datetime().nullable(),
    })),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager', 'designer', 'bookkeeper', 'viewer'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier,
  },
  /** GET /api/v1/projects/:id — Project detail */
  get: { method: 'GET' as const, path: '/api/v1/projects/:id',
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager', 'designer', 'bookkeeper', 'viewer'] as TenantRole[],
    rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier },
  /** POST /api/v1/projects — Create project */
  create: { method: 'POST' as const, path: '/api/v1/projects',
    request: z.object({ name: z.string().min(1).max(255), customer_id: z.string().uuid().optional(),
      budget: z.number().optional(), start_date: z.string().datetime().optional(),
      due_date: z.string().datetime().optional(),
      source: z.enum(['manual', 'jobtread', 'kb_estimate']).default('manual') }),
    response: z.object({ id: z.string().uuid() }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager'] as TenantRole[], rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier },
  /** PUT /api/v1/projects/:id — Update project */
  update: { method: 'PUT' as const, path: '/api/v1/projects/:id',
    request: z.object({ name: z.string().optional(), status: z.enum(['active', 'completed', 'on_hold', 'cancelled']).optional(),
      budget: z.number().optional() }),
    response: z.object({ id: z.string().uuid() }),
    auth: ['owner', 'admin', 'manager'] as TenantRole[], rate_limit: 'standard' as RateLimitTier },
} as const;


// ============================================================================
// PART 3: WEBSOCKET EVENT CATALOG (Socket.io)
// ============================================================================
// Transport: WebSocket-only (no HTTP long-polling fallback — Section 3b).
// Room naming: tenant:{tenantId}:{channel}
// Server-initiated room joins only (validated against auth token).
// Cross-node delivery via @socket.io/redis-adapter.

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Server -> Client Events
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export const ServerEvents = {
  /**
   * Agent execution status update.
   * Room: tenant:{tenantId}:dashboard
   * Emitted on every execution state transition.
   */
  'execution:status': z.object({
    execution_id: z.string().uuid(),
    agent_type: z.nativeEnum(AgentType),
    status: z.nativeEnum(ExecutionStatus),
    step_count: z.number().int().nonneg(),
    /** Progress percentage (0-100) if deterministic */
    progress: z.number().min(0).max(100).nullable(),
    /** Error message if failed */
    error: z.string().nullable(),
    updated_at: z.string().datetime(),
  }),

  /**
   * New escalation created (needs human attention).
   * Room: tenant:{tenantId}:escalations
   */
  'escalation:created': z.object({
    escalation: EscalationSchema,
  }),

  /**
   * Escalation resolved (by another user).
   * Room: tenant:{tenantId}:escalations
   */
  'escalation:resolved': z.object({
    escalation_id: z.string().uuid(),
    status: z.nativeEnum(EscalationStatus),
    resolved_by: z.string().uuid(),
  }),

  /**
   * New draft ready for review.
   * Room: tenant:{tenantId}:dashboard
   */
  'draft:created': z.object({
    draft: DraftSchema,
  }),

  /**
   * New notification.
   * Room: tenant:{tenantId}:notifications:{userId}
   */
  'notification:new': z.object({
    notification: NotificationSchema,
  }),

  /**
   * Notification badge count update.
   * Room: tenant:{tenantId}:notifications:{userId}
   */
  'notification:count': z.object({
    unread_count: z.number().int().nonneg(),
  }),

  /**
   * Agent streaming token (SSE alternative for non-SSE clients).
   * Room: tenant:{tenantId}:agent:{agentType}
   */
  'agent:token': z.object({
    execution_id: z.string().uuid(),
    agent_type: z.nativeEnum(AgentType),
    /** Streamed text token */
    token: z.string(),
    /** Whether this is the final token */
    is_final: z.boolean(),
  }),

  /**
   * Agent tool call event (for real-time dashboard visualization).
   * Room: tenant:{tenantId}:agent:{agentType}
   */
  'agent:tool_call': z.object({
    execution_id: z.string().uuid(),
    agent_type: z.nativeEnum(AgentType),
    tool_name: z.string(),
    step: z.number().int(),
    status: z.enum(['started', 'completed', 'failed']),
    duration_ms: z.number().int().nonneg().optional(),
  }),

  /**
   * Integration sync status update.
   * Room: tenant:{tenantId}:integrations
   */
  'integration:sync_status': z.object({
    service: z.nativeEnum(IntegrationService),
    status: z.nativeEnum(IntegrationStatus),
    last_sync_at: z.string().datetime().nullable(),
    error: z.string().nullable(),
  }),

  /**
   * Integration health alert (proactive support).
   * Room: tenant:{tenantId}:dashboard
   */
  'integration:alert': z.object({
    service: z.nativeEnum(IntegrationService),
    alert_type: z.enum(['token_expiring', 'sync_failed', 'disconnected']),
    message: z.string(),
    action_url: z.string(),
  }),

  /**
   * Support Agent typing indicator.
   * Room: tenant:{tenantId}:support:{userId}
   */
  'support:typing': z.object({
    conversation_id: z.string().uuid(),
    is_typing: z.boolean(),
  }),

  /**
   * Support Agent message.
   * Room: tenant:{tenantId}:support:{userId}
   */
  'support:message': z.object({
    conversation_id: z.string().uuid(),
    message: SupportMessageSchema,
  }),

  /**
   * CSV import progress update.
   * Room: tenant:{tenantId}:imports
   */
  'import:progress': z.object({
    import_job_id: z.string().uuid(),
    rows_processed: z.number().int(),
    total_rows: z.number().int(),
    errors: z.number().int(),
    status: z.enum(['processing', 'completed', 'failed']),
  }),

  /**
   * Session invalidation broadcast (logout, member removal, password change).
   * Room: tenant:{tenantId}:sessions
   */
  'session:invalidated': z.object({
    reason: z.enum(['logout', 'member_removed', 'password_changed', 'role_changed']),
    user_id: z.string().uuid(),
  }),

  /**
   * Usage limit alert.
   * Room: tenant:{tenantId}:dashboard
   */
  'usage:alert': z.object({
    alert_type: z.enum(['80_percent', '100_percent']),
    current_usage: z.number(),
    limit: z.number(),
    resource: z.enum(['daily_api_calls', 'monthly_ai_spend']),
    message: z.string(),
  }),

  /**
   * Morning briefing ready notification (CEO only).
   * Room: tenant:{tenantId}:executive
   */
  'briefing:ready': z.object({
    draft_id: z.string().uuid(),
    title: z.string(),
    summary: z.string(),
  }),
} as const;

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Client -> Server Events
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export const ClientEvents = {
  /**
   * Subscribe to tenant rooms on connection.
   * Server validates tenant_id against auth token before room join.
   */
  'subscribe': z.object({
    /** Channels to subscribe to */
    channels: z.array(z.enum([
      'dashboard',
      'escalations',
      'integrations',
      'notifications',
      'support',
      'imports',
      'executive',
      'sessions',
    ])),
  }),

  /**
   * Unsubscribe from channels.
   */
  'unsubscribe': z.object({
    channels: z.array(z.string()),
  }),

  /**
   * Mark notification as read (real-time sync across tabs).
   */
  'notification:mark_read': z.object({
    notification_id: z.string().uuid(),
  }),

  /**
   * Support Agent: user is typing indicator.
   */
  'support:user_typing': z.object({
    conversation_id: z.string().uuid(),
    is_typing: z.boolean(),
  }),

  /**
   * Reconnection: send last-received event timestamp for replay.
   */
  'reconnect:sync': z.object({
    last_event_timestamp: z.string().datetime(),
  }),

  /**
   * Heartbeat/ping (keep connection alive).
   */
  'ping': z.object({
    timestamp: z.number(),
  }),
} as const;


// ============================================================================
// PART 4: NATS SUBJECT CATALOG (JetStream)
// ============================================================================
// Canonical format: TENANT_{tenantId}.{domain}.{name}.{event}
// All subjects built via buildSubject(tenantId, domain, name, event) helper.
// CI lint rule rejects raw string subjects.
// Single internal NATS user for backend services (per-tenant NKey deferred to post-100-tenant).

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Standard Inter-Agent Event Payload (AI-15)
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export const NatsEventPayloadSchema = z.object({
  /** Event type identifier */
  event_type: z.string(),
  /** Tenant context */
  tenant_id: z.string().uuid(),
  /** Which agent published this event */
  source_agent: z.nativeEnum(AgentType).nullable(),
  /** Intended receiving agent (null = broadcast) */
  target_agent: z.nativeEnum(AgentType).nullable(),
  /** Event-specific payload */
  payload: z.record(z.unknown()),
  /** Reference to originating agent execution for context lookup */
  context_ref: z.string().uuid().nullable(),
  /** W3C traceparent for distributed tracing */
  trace_context: z.string().nullable().default(null),
  /** Event timestamp (ISO 8601) */
  timestamp: z.string().datetime(),
});
export type NatsEventPayload = z.infer<typeof NatsEventPayloadSchema>;

/**
 * Complete NATS Subject Catalog.
 *
 * Format: TENANT_{tenantId}.{domain}.{name}.{event}
 * Builder: buildSubject(tenantId, domain, name, event)
 */
export const NatsSubjects = {
  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  // Agent Execution Events
  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------

  /** Agent execution started */
  AGENT_EXECUTION_STARTED: {
    pattern: 'TENANT_{tenantId}.agent.{agentType}.execution.started',
    publisher: 'Agent Executor (BullMQ Worker)',
    consumers: ['Dashboard WebSocket Relay', 'Event Bus Logger'],
    durability: 'JetStream' as const,
    description: 'Published when an agent begins execution.',
  },

  /** Agent execution completed */
  AGENT_EXECUTION_COMPLETED: {
    pattern: 'TENANT_{tenantId}.agent.{agentType}.execution.completed',
    publisher: 'Agent Executor (BullMQ Worker)',
    consumers: ['Dashboard WebSocket Relay', 'Event Bus Logger', 'Inter-Agent Coordinator', 'Usage Tracker'],
    durability: 'JetStream' as const,
    description: 'Published when an agent execution completes successfully.',
  },

  /** Agent execution failed */
  AGENT_EXECUTION_FAILED: {
    pattern: 'TENANT_{tenantId}.agent.{agentType}.execution.failed',
    publisher: 'Agent Executor (BullMQ Worker)',
    consumers: ['Dashboard WebSocket Relay', 'Event Bus Logger', 'Proactive Support Monitor', 'DLQ Handler'],
    durability: 'JetStream' as const,
    description: 'Published on agent execution failure. Proactive Support monitors for failure streaks.',
  },

  /** Agent execution timed out */
  AGENT_EXECUTION_TIMEOUT: {
    pattern: 'TENANT_{tenantId}.agent.{agentType}.execution.timeout',
    publisher: 'Agent Executor (BullMQ Worker)',
    consumers: ['Dashboard WebSocket Relay', 'Event Bus Logger', 'DLQ Handler'],
    durability: 'JetStream' as const,
    description: 'Published when agent exceeds 300s wall-clock timeout.',
  },

  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  // Inter-Agent Coordination (AI-15)
  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------

  /** Leads Agent qualified a new lead */
  LEAD_QUALIFIED: {
    pattern: 'TENANT_{tenantId}.agent.discovery_concierge.lead.qualified',
    publisher: 'Leads Agent',
    consumers: ['Sales Agent (if auto-estimate enabled)', 'CEO Agent (for daily briefing)'],
    durability: 'JetStream' as const,
    description: 'New lead scored as hot/warm by Leads Agent.',
  },

  /** Sales Agent completed an estimate */
  ESTIMATE_COMPLETED: {
    pattern: 'TENANT_{tenantId}.agent.estimate_engine.estimate.completed',
    publisher: 'Sales Agent',
    consumers: ['Project Management Agent', 'CEO Agent', 'Bookkeeping Agent'],
    durability: 'JetStream' as const,
    description: 'Estimate finalized. Includes context_ref to lookup estimate data.',
  },

  /** Project Management Agent detected schedule drift */
  SCHEDULE_DRIFT_DETECTED: {
    pattern: 'TENANT_{tenantId}.agent.project_orchestrator.schedule.drift',
    publisher: 'Project Management Agent',
    consumers: ['CEO Agent', 'Bookkeeping Agent'],
    durability: 'JetStream' as const,
    description: 'Schedule deviation exceeds threshold. May trigger escalation.',
  },

  /** Bookkeeping Agent flagged a financial anomaly */
  FINANCIAL_ANOMALY: {
    pattern: 'TENANT_{tenantId}.agent.operations_controller.financial.anomaly',
    publisher: 'Bookkeeping Agent',
    consumers: ['CEO Agent'],
    durability: 'JetStream' as const,
    description: 'AR overdue, budget overrun, or other financial flag.',
  },

  /** CEO Agent morning briefing generated */
  BRIEFING_GENERATED: {
    pattern: 'TENANT_{tenantId}.agent.executive_navigator.briefing.generated',
    publisher: 'CEO Agent',
    consumers: ['Dashboard WebSocket Relay (CEO notification)'],
    durability: 'JetStream' as const,
    description: 'Daily CEO morning briefing draft created.',
  },

  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  // Escalation Events
  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------

  /** New escalation created by any agent */
  ESCALATION_CREATED: {
    pattern: 'TENANT_{tenantId}.escalation.created',
    publisher: 'Any agent via escalate() method',
    consumers: ['Dashboard WebSocket Relay', 'Notification Service', 'Event Bus Logger'],
    durability: 'JetStream' as const,
    description: 'Human-in-the-loop approval needed.',
  },

  /** Escalation resolved (approved, rejected, modified) */
  ESCALATION_RESOLVED: {
    pattern: 'TENANT_{tenantId}.escalation.resolved',
    publisher: 'API Handler (escalation routes)',
    consumers: ['Agent Executor (to execute approved action)', 'Dashboard WebSocket Relay', 'Event Bus Logger'],
    durability: 'JetStream' as const,
    description: 'Human resolved an escalation. If approved, triggers action execution.',
  },

  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  // Draft Events
  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------

  /** New draft created for review */
  DRAFT_CREATED: {
    pattern: 'TENANT_{tenantId}.draft.created',
    publisher: 'Any agent',
    consumers: ['Dashboard WebSocket Relay', 'Notification Service'],
    durability: 'JetStream' as const,
    description: 'Agent-generated content ready for human review.',
  },

  /** Draft approved/rejected */
  DRAFT_RESOLVED: {
    pattern: 'TENANT_{tenantId}.draft.resolved',
    publisher: 'API Handler (draft routes)',
    consumers: ['Action Executor (send email, create record)', 'Event Bus Logger'],
    durability: 'JetStream' as const,
    description: 'Human approved or rejected a draft.',
  },

  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  // Webhook Events (External -> Internal)
  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------

  /** Inbound webhook from any external service */
  WEBHOOK_RECEIVED: {
    pattern: 'TENANT_{tenantId}.webhook.{service}.{eventType}',
    publisher: 'Webhook Handler (API routes)',
    consumers: ['Relevant agent(s) based on service/event routing', 'Event Bus Logger'],
    durability: 'JetStream' as const,
    description: 'External webhook processed and published to NATS for agent consumption.',
  },

  /** Inbound email received via SendGrid */
  EMAIL_INBOUND: {
    pattern: 'TENANT_{tenantId}.webhook.sendgrid.email_inbound',
    publisher: 'SendGrid Webhook Handler',
    consumers: ['Leads Agent (lead processing)', 'Event Bus Logger'],
    durability: 'JetStream' as const,
    description: 'Inbound email parsed by SendGrid Inbound Parse.',
  },

  /** Stripe billing event */
  BILLING_EVENT: {
    pattern: 'TENANT_{tenantId}.webhook.stripe.{eventType}',
    publisher: 'Stripe Webhook Handler',
    consumers: ['Billing State Machine', 'Notification Service'],
    durability: 'JetStream' as const,
    description: 'Stripe subscription lifecycle events.',
  },

  /** JobTread data change */
  JOBTREAD_SYNC: {
    pattern: 'TENANT_{tenantId}.webhook.jobtread.{entityType}.{action}',
    publisher: 'JobTread Webhook Handler / Polling Sync Job',
    consumers: ['Project Management Agent', 'Sales Agent', 'Data Mirror Sync Service'],
    durability: 'JetStream' as const,
    description: 'JobTread project/task/contact data change events.',
  },

  /** QuickBooks financial data change */
  QUICKBOOKS_SYNC: {
    pattern: 'TENANT_{tenantId}.webhook.quickbooks.{entityType}.{action}',
    publisher: 'QuickBooks Webhook Handler',
    consumers: ['Bookkeeping Agent', 'CEO Agent'],
    durability: 'JetStream' as const,
    description: 'QuickBooks invoice/payment/account data changes.',
  },

  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  // Integration Events
  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------

  /** Integration connected/disconnected */
  INTEGRATION_STATUS_CHANGED: {
    pattern: 'TENANT_{tenantId}.integration.{service}.status_changed',
    publisher: 'Integration Service',
    consumers: ['Dashboard WebSocket Relay', 'Notification Service'],
    durability: 'JetStream' as const,
    description: 'Integration connection status changed.',
  },

  /** OAuth token refreshed */
  TOKEN_REFRESHED: {
    pattern: 'TENANT_{tenantId}.integration.{service}.token_refreshed',
    publisher: 'Token Refresh Background Job',
    consumers: ['Event Bus Logger'],
    durability: 'core' as const,
    description: 'OAuth token successfully refreshed. Core NATS (no persistence needed).',
  },

  /** OAuth token refresh failed */
  TOKEN_REFRESH_FAILED: {
    pattern: 'TENANT_{tenantId}.integration.{service}.token_refresh_failed',
    publisher: 'Token Refresh Background Job',
    consumers: ['Notification Service', 'Proactive Support Monitor'],
    durability: 'JetStream' as const,
    description: 'OAuth token refresh failed. Alerts tenant to reconnect.',
  },

  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  // Notification Events
  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------

  /** Notification dispatched (for cross-channel delivery) */
  NOTIFICATION_DISPATCHED: {
    pattern: 'TENANT_{tenantId}.notification.dispatched',
    publisher: 'Notification Service',
    consumers: ['Dashboard WebSocket Relay', 'Email Delivery Service', 'Slack Delivery Service'],
    durability: 'JetStream' as const,
    description: 'Notification created. Consumers deliver to configured channels.',
  },

  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  // Support Events
  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------

  /** Support conversation created */
  SUPPORT_CONVERSATION_CREATED: {
    pattern: 'TENANT_{tenantId}.support.conversation.created',
    publisher: 'Support API Handler',
    consumers: ['Support Agent Executor', 'Event Bus Logger'],
    durability: 'JetStream' as const,
    description: 'New support conversation started by user.',
  },

  /** Support escalation to human */
  SUPPORT_ESCALATED: {
    pattern: 'TENANT_{tenantId}.support.conversation.escalated',
    publisher: 'Support Agent',
    consumers: ['Notification Service (founders)', 'Linear Ticket Creator'],
    durability: 'JetStream' as const,
    description: 'Support Agent escalated to human support.',
  },

  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  // Spending & Usage Events
  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------

  /** Tenant spending threshold reached */
  SPENDING_THRESHOLD: {
    pattern: 'TENANT_{tenantId}.billing.spending.threshold',
    publisher: 'AI SDK costTrackingMiddleware',
    consumers: ['Notification Service', 'Rate Limiter'],
    durability: 'JetStream' as const,
    description: 'Tenant reached 80% or 100% of AI spending limit.',
  },

  /** Daily usage sync completed */
  USAGE_SYNCED: {
    pattern: 'TENANT_{tenantId}.billing.usage.synced',
    publisher: 'Daily Usage Sync Cron Job',
    consumers: ['Event Bus Logger'],
    durability: 'core' as const,
    description: 'Daily tenant usage aggregation completed.',
  },

  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  // Tenant Lifecycle Events
  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------

  /** New tenant provisioned */
  TENANT_PROVISIONED: {
    pattern: 'SYSTEM.tenant.provisioned',
    publisher: 'Tenant Provisioning Saga',
    consumers: ['Welcome Email Service', 'Event Bus Logger'],
    durability: 'JetStream' as const,
    description: 'New tenant fully provisioned (DB, NATS namespace, Valkey prefix).',
  },

  /** Tenant offboarding started */
  TENANT_OFFBOARDING: {
    pattern: 'SYSTEM.tenant.offboarding',
    publisher: 'Tenant Offboarding Service',
    consumers: ['Data Export Job', 'Integration Cleanup Job', 'Event Bus Logger'],
    durability: 'JetStream' as const,
    description: 'Tenant churn. Triggers data export, integration cleanup, 90-day deletion queue.',
  },

  /** Member removed from tenant */
  MEMBER_REMOVED: {
    pattern: 'TENANT_{tenantId}.member.removed',
    publisher: 'Team Management API',
    consumers: ['WebSocket Server (force eviction)', 'Session Revocation Service'],
    durability: 'JetStream' as const,
    description: 'Member removed. Socket forcibly disconnected, sessions revoked.',
  },

  /** Member role changed */
  MEMBER_ROLE_CHANGED: {
    pattern: 'TENANT_{tenantId}.member.role_changed',
    publisher: 'Team Management API',
    consumers: ['WebSocket Server (room re-validation)', 'Session Revocation Service'],
    durability: 'JetStream' as const,
    description: 'Member role updated. Re-validate room access and permissions.',
  },
} as const;


// ============================================================================
// HELPER TYPES & UTILITIES
// ============================================================================

/**
 * NATS subject builder — enforces canonical format.
 * CI lint rule: all publish/subscribe calls MUST use this helper.
 */
export function buildSubject(
  tenantId: string,
  domain: string,
  name: string,
  event: string,
): string {
  return `TENANT_${tenantId}.${domain}.${name}.${event}`;
}

/**
 * Parse a tenant room name and extract tenant ID.
 * Room format: tenant:{tenantId}:{channel}
 */
export function parseTenantRoom(roomName: string): {
  tenantId: string;
  channel: string;
} | null {
  const match = roomName.match(/^tenant:([a-f0-9-]+):(.+)$/);
  if (!match) return null;
  return { tenantId: match[1], channel: match[2] };
}

/**
 * BullMQ job ID builder — deterministic for deduplication (Section 9, Wave 2).
 * Format: ${tenantId}:${agentId}:${triggerType}:${windowId}
 */
export function buildJobId(
  tenantId: string,
  agentId: string,
  triggerType: TriggerType,
  /** Time-bucket (floor to 5-minute intervals for scheduled jobs) */
  windowId?: string,
): string {
  const window = windowId ?? Math.floor(Date.now() / 300_000).toString();
  return `${tenantId}:${agentId}:${triggerType}:${window}`;
}

/**
 * Hono RPC AppType export.
 * Use hcWithType pattern to avoid IDE slowdown with large route trees (HONO-07).
 */
export type AppRoutes = {
  auth: typeof AuthRoutes;
  tenants: typeof TenantRoutes;
  agents: typeof AgentRoutes;
  executions: typeof ExecutionRoutes;
  escalations: typeof EscalationRoutes;
  drafts: typeof DraftRoutes;
  integrations: typeof IntegrationRoutes;
  support: typeof SupportRoutes;
  notifications: typeof NotificationRoutes;
  admin: typeof AdminRoutes;
  team: typeof TeamRoutes;
  billing: typeof BillingRoutes;
  import: typeof ImportRoutes;
  profile: typeof ProfileRoutes;
  health: typeof HealthRoutes;
  kb: typeof KnowledgeBaseRoutes;
};

15. Business Operating System

Production Naming

The sidebar label and all user-facing UI must use “Business OS” (not “EOS”) to avoid trademark issues with EOS Worldwide. Internal documentation and this spec reference “EOS” for clarity of methodology origin, but production code, routes (/bos/*), and UI copy use the trademark-safe “Business OS” label.

This section defines Kiptra AI’s built-in Business Operating System — a complete implementation of the EOS (Entrepreneurial Operating System) methodology as a native feature module. Rather than integrating with existing EOS software (none offer APIs), Kiptra builds the entire capability from scratch with construction-industry-specific advantages, AI augmentation, and an open integration layer that no competitor provides.

15.1 Overview & Strategic Rationale

The Entrepreneurial Operating System is a business management methodology used by over 130,000+ companies worldwide (per EOS Worldwide’s 2024 data). It provides a structured framework for vision alignment, quarterly goal-setting, weekly meeting cadence, KPI tracking, issue resolution, and people management. EOS is enormously popular in construction — Sachse Construction grew from $35M to $138M during its scaling phase using it, and the methodology’s emphasis on accountability, measurables, and execution discipline maps directly to how construction companies operate.

The dominant EOS software platform, Ninety.io, has a critical limitation: historically limited integration capabilities. Ninety launched Scorecard Integrations in Q1 2026, is beta-testing a limited Scorecard API for Q2 2026, added a Monday.com integration (Dec 2025 beta), and has To-Dos integration with Todoist/Asana/ClickUp in beta. However, it still lacks a general-purpose API, webhook subscriptions, or construction-specific integrations, and charges $11.20–$16 per user per month. This creates a strategic opening for Kiptra AI.

Key insight: No construction project management tool offers EOS features. No EOS tool offers construction PM features. Kiptra AI is uniquely positioned to deliver both in a single platform — with AI augmentation, automated KPI data, and an open API that Ninety.io cannot match.

Why Build vs. Integrate

Factor Ninety.io (Status Quo) Kiptra Built-In (Our Approach)
API / Webhooks Limited Scorecard API (beta Q2 2026); no general-purpose API or webhooks Full REST API + webhook subscriptions
KPI Data Entry 100% manual Automated from project data, financials, CRM
AI Features Basic meeting prep only Full AI: meeting summaries, goal creation, trend analysis
Construction Context Generic for all industries Construction-specific templates, KPIs, and terminology
Pricing $11.20–$16/user/mo (tiered) Included in Kiptra subscription (flat pricing)
Data Portability No export API, manual CSV only Full export, API access, PDF reports
Real-time Collaboration Standard web-based (no live cursor/presence indicators) Supabase Realtime (WebSocket, presence, live cursors)

Competitive Advantages Summary

  1. Open API + Webhooks — Ninety lacks a general-purpose API or webhook system (limited Scorecard API in beta Q2 2026). Every piece of Business OS data in Kiptra is API-accessible and webhook-subscribable.
  2. Automated KPI Data — Ninety requires manual entry for every measurable. Kiptra auto-populates from project data, QuickBooks, CRM, and job costing.
  3. Construction-Specific Templates — Pre-built quarterly goals, KPI dashboards, and meeting agendas tailored to GCs, subcontractors, and design-build firms.
  4. AI Meeting Summaries — Full meeting recap generation, action item extraction, and issue identification. Ninety only offers AI-assisted meeting preparation.
  5. Flat Competitive Pricing — No per-user Business OS tier. Business OS features included in the Kiptra subscription.
Emerging Competitor: EOS One

EOS One is the official software from EOS Worldwide. Per-user pricing model. Limited API/integration capabilities. Its key competitive threat is implementer channel bias — certified EOS Implementers may recommend EOS One due to official brand endorsement, regardless of feature parity. Kiptra’s construction-specific value proposition and open API/integration story must be strong enough to overcome this channel advantage.

Companion Document: EOS Feature Parity Matrix

A detailed 86-feature comparison between Kiptra AI and Ninety.io is maintained as a separate companion document: eos-feature-parity-matrix.html (63 KB, 1,667 lines). The matrix evaluates every Ninety.io feature against Kiptra’s planned implementation.

Headline stats:

StatusCount%
Full Parity5260%
Partial Parity1416%
Missing / Not Planned1113%
Kiptra-Only (Advantage)910%
Total8676% parity

Key Kiptra advantages not in Ninety.io: Open API + webhooks, AI-powered meeting recaps, automated KPI population from integrations, construction-specific templates, AI goal/seat creation, and real-time multi-user collaboration. The 11 missing features are primarily community/social features (user community forum, implementer directory) and niche methodology tools (meeting pulse rating trend, organizational checkup) that have low impact on the target construction vertical.

Companion Document: Business OS & K&B Competitive Pricing Analysis

A comprehensive pricing analysis is maintained as a separate companion document: kiptra-eos-kb-pricing-analysis.html. Key findings:

Business OS competitive landscape:

  • Ninety.io: $11.20–$16/user/month. For a 25-person company: $210–$400/mo for Business OS features alone — on top of PM software.
  • Bloom Growth: Starting at $249/mo (annual commitment required). Contact for enterprise pricing.
  • General PM tools (monday.com, Asana, ClickUp): $7–$25/user/mo but no native business operating system structure.

K&B design tool landscape:

  • Cyncly Design Flex (2020 Design successor): $2,500/yr (current verified price). Windows-only, crash-prone.
  • Chief Architect Premier: $1,995/yr or $229/mo. Overkill for K&B-only use.
  • AI/consumer tools (Planner 5D, Coohom, Spacely): $25–$65/mo. Consumer-grade, no BOM or estimate integration.
  • Coohom (Kujiale/Manycore Tech): $312M funded, $2B valuation. Browser-based, AI-powered, 10M+ users. Closest direct competitor. However, their ToS grants perpetual rights to all user content for ML training, data routes through Chinese infrastructure (Hangzhou), and they lack CRM/PM/estimating integration. Kiptra differentiates through: (1) NA manufacturer catalog depth via dealer relationships, (2) integrated business platform (CRM + PM + design + estimates), (3) formal NKBA compliance validation (Z3 SMT), (4) conversational AI design, (5) self-hosted rendering with zero data leaving customer infrastructure.
KB-Derived Competitive Intelligence

Rendering quality gap is closable: Chief Architect’s rendering quality (often cited as its primary advantage) is achievable via the Phase 2 rendering pipeline: PBR materials (MeshStandardMaterial with environment maps) + three-gpu-pathtracer for global illumination and soft shadows + AI denoising (Flux/SD img2img with ControlNet). Chief Architect uses a CPU-bound ray tracer internally — a GPU path tracer in the browser can match or exceed this quality at faster speeds. The key insight: Chief Architect’s visual fidelity comes from its PBR material library, not from a fundamentally superior rendering algorithm. Kiptra’s procedural cabinet generator + manufacturer-provided texture maps can achieve equivalent material quality.

Catalog configuration rules are standards-based, not proprietary: Cabinet configuration rules (door overlay types, hinge placement, filler strip requirements, corner cabinet geometry) follow KCMA (Kitchen Cabinet Manufacturers Association) and AWI (Architectural Woodwork Institute) published standards. These are industry specifications, not proprietary IP owned by any software vendor. This means Kiptra can implement the same configuration logic as 2020 Design or Chief Architect without IP risk — the rules themselves are standardized, only the software implementation is proprietary.

Pricing recommendation: Bundle Business OS into all Kiptra tiers (no per-user surcharge — competitive weapon against Ninety.io). K&B Design Tool as tiered add-on: Essentials $99/mo (52% cheaper than Cyncly), Professional $199/mo (with AI layout generation and photorealistic renders). Business OS margin: high (database storage only). K&B margin: 94–98% (AI render cost $0.02–$0.06/render).

15.2 Trademark-Safe Terminology

EOS Worldwide holds registered trademarks on many terms commonly associated with their methodology. All Kiptra implementations must use trademark-safe alternatives exclusively — in code, UI, documentation, marketing, and API surface.

Trademark Enforcement Warning

EOS Worldwide has in-house counsel and external IP analysts actively patrolling for trademark infringement. They have sent cease-and-desist letters to software companies using their terminology. ALL code, UI labels, API endpoints, documentation, and marketing materials MUST use the safe alternatives listed below. Zero exceptions.

EOS Trademarked Term Kiptra Safe Alternative Usage Notes
EOS Business Operating System Never reference “EOS” in any user-facing context
Rocks Quarterly Goals / 90-Day Priorities DB column: rock → quarterly_goal
Level 10 / L10 Weekly Sync Meeting type enum: weekly_sync
Scorecard KPI Dashboard Route: /kpi-dashboard
IDS (Identify, Discuss, Solve) Issue Resolution Process (IRP) Three phases: Identify → Discuss → Resolve
V/TO (Vision/Traction Organizer) Strategic Vision Plan Route: /vision-plan
People Analyzer Team Fit Assessment Route: /team-fit
GWC (Get it, Want it, Capacity) Role Fit Check (Competency/Commitment/Capacity) Abbreviation: CCC
Accountability Chart Responsibility Map Route: /responsibility-map
Integrator Operations Leader Seat type enum: operations_leader
Visionary Strategic Leader Seat type enum: strategic_leader
Traction Execution Discipline Never use “traction” in EOS context
Core Focus Mission & Niche Vision plan subsection
90-Day World Quarterly Cycle Planning period reference
Issues List Issue Tracker Avoid “issues list” as a compound noun
To-Do List Weekly Action Items 7-day scope, distinct from project tasks

15.3 Module Inventory

The Business Operating System comprises 18 modules organized across four pricing tiers. Each module maps to specific EOS methodology components while using exclusively trademark-safe terminology.

# Module (Safe Name) Tier Complexity Core Functionality
1 Strategic Vision Plan Free Medium Digitized strategic planning document — mission, niche, 10-year target, 3-year picture, 1-year plan, quarterly focus. Versioned with diff tracking.
2 Quarterly Goals Essentials Complex 90-day priorities with milestones, owner assignment, status tracking, cascading alignment (company → department → individual), progress rollup.
3 KPI Dashboard Essentials Complex Weekly measurables/KPIs with goal ranges, trend visualization, on/off track indicators. Automated data feeds from QuickBooks, CRM, project data.
4 Weekly Action Items Essentials Medium 7-day action items created during meetings. Auto-carry forward if incomplete. Owner, due date, completion status. Distinct from project tasks.
5 Issue Tracker (IRP) Essentials Medium Structured issue resolution: identify → discuss → resolve. Priority ranking, categorization (short-term, long-term, departmental), resolution logging.
6 Meeting Hub (Weekly Sync) Essentials+ Complex Structured meeting facilitation with timed sections, real-time collaboration, agenda templates, rating system, automated recap generation via AI.
7 Responsibility Map Free Complex Function-based org chart. Seats (roles) separate from people. Drag-and-drop hierarchy. 5 core functions: Strategic Leadership, Operations Leadership, Sales/Marketing, Operations, Finance. Note: HR is a common secondary function added by many companies.
8 SOP Builder Thrive Medium Process documentation with step-by-step instructions, checklists, media embeds. Version control, approval workflows, department assignment.
9 Quarterly Reviews Accelerate Complex Structured review workflow: self-assessment → manager review → discussion → finalization. Core values alignment scoring, role fit check (CCC), goal retrospective.
10 Team Fit Assessment Accelerate Medium Core values evaluation + CCC (Competency/Commitment/Capacity) assessment. Traffic light scoring (+, +/-, -). Trend tracking over quarters.
11 Announcements Essentials Simple Headlines and wins shared during meetings. Company-wide or team-scoped. Archive with search. Feeds into meeting agenda automatically.
12 Goal Milestones Essentials Simple Sub-goals within quarterly goals. Weekly checkpoints with on/off track status. Milestone completion drives parent goal progress percentage.
13 Analytics Dashboard Accelerate Medium Computed insights across all modules: goal completion rates, meeting effectiveness, KPI trends, issue resolution velocity, team health scores.
14 My Dashboard Essentials Medium Personal cross-team view aggregating all goals, action items, KPIs, issues, and upcoming meetings for the logged-in user. Customizable layout.
15 Knowledge Portal Free/Thrive Complex Combined LMS + wiki. Rich-text articles with content blocks, collections, categories. Seat-based assignment, progress tracking, completion certificates, content freshness enforcement.
16 Business Health Assessment Free/Thrive Medium Structured surveys measuring organizational health across the 6 key components. Anonymous responses, trend tracking, benchmark comparisons.
17 People Directory All Medium User/employee management with profiles, seat assignments, team memberships, role history. Core values listing. Integration with better-auth identity.
18 AI Assistant Thrive Complex Conversational AI for Business OS tasks: SMART goal creation, seat building, meeting prep summaries, KPI trend analysis, issue prioritization recommendations.

15.4 Technical Architecture

The Business Operating System modules leverage the existing Kiptra platform infrastructure (Sections 1–6) while introducing several new technical capabilities. Each subsystem is designed to be independently deployable and testable.

15.4.1 Real-time Collaboration

Multiple users will simultaneously edit vision plans, manage meeting agendas, and update KPI values. The collaboration layer must handle concurrent edits without data loss while remaining simple enough to maintain.

Key insight: Full CRDT implementations (Yjs, Automerge) are unnecessary complexity for this use case. Most Business OS fields are single-value (a goal title, a KPI number, a status enum) where Last-Writer-Wins is perfectly adequate. Only long-form text fields (vision plan narratives, meeting notes) require collaborative editing — and ProseMirror’s built-in prosemirror-collab handles this without CRDTs. Note: Section 16 (Kitchen & Bath Design Tool) does adopt Yjs CRDTs in Phase 3 for real-time multi-user 3D scene editing — a fundamentally different problem where spatial object state requires conflict-free merging rather than field-level LWW. The two modules correctly use different collaboration strategies for different problem shapes.

Architecture:

  • Transport: Supabase Realtime — Broadcast (ephemeral events like cursor positions), Presence (who’s viewing/editing), and Postgres Changes (live DB subscriptions for data sync). Note: Section 3b rejected Supabase Realtime for the main dashboard due to the 500-connection cap on Pro. The Business OS use case is different: meeting collaboration is bounded to <10 concurrent editors per session (one team’s weekly meeting), not 500+ simultaneous dashboard connections. If Business OS adoption scales beyond 50+ concurrent meetings, migrate this transport to Socket.io (already deployed for the main platform).
  • Field-level conflicts: LWW-Register per field. Each field update carries a updated_at timestamp; latest write wins. Supabase Realtime broadcasts the change to all subscribers.
  • Rich text collaboration: TipTap + Hocuspocus (see ADR below) for vision plan narratives, meeting notes, and knowledge portal articles.
